game: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II
title: Main Story Walkthrough
author: Neoseeker
attribution: This walkthrough was pulled from Neoseeker (neoseeker.com) and processed for a cleaner reading experience. All credit for the original content goes to the Neoseeker community.

blocks.heading: Prologue Part A: November 29
blocks.content:
Start a new game and select the game's difficulty level. If you plan on getting the Platinum trophy, you will need at least two playthroughs. If you have save data from *Trails of Cold Steel*, you can transfer your save file over for extra bonuses (see tables below).

<!-- checkpoint: pro-new-game | Started New Game -->

blocks.heading: Difficulty Settings
rows: Balanced for quick, easy battles. Ideal for beginners and story enthusiasts.
Enemies are at 0.70 of their stats.
Build around satisfyingly tough combat. Aimed at people used to playing RPGs.
Enemies are at 1.00 of their stats.
Battles will take everything you have. For skilled players who find Normal too easy.
Enemies are at 1.15 of their stats.
Balanced for New Game+. Ideal for replays.
Enemies are at 1.30 of their stats.

blocks.heading: Transfer Bonuses: Rean's Level
rows: Sepith x100 (All Colors), Attack 1, Zeram Powder
Sepith x300 (All Colors), Attack 1, Soul Blur, Zeram Powder
Sepith x500 (All Colors), Attack 1, Soul Blur, Saintly Force, Zeram Powder

blocks.content: Watch the introduction sequence carefully. If you haven't beaten the original *Trails of Cold Steel*, this part will give you a summary of the ending — **beware of spoilers**.

blocks.heading: Taking Control & Basic Mechanics
blocks.content:
After the intro sequence ends, you'll take control of **Rean**. Enemy information in this guide is based on **Normal mode** circumstances.

The game immediately introduces the **save system** — open the menu and use the **Save** option at any time. You can also use the **Cross-Save feature** to upload save data to PSN for transferring between PS3 and Vita.

If you ever get lost, press the **Square** button to open the **Navigation menu**, which highlights your next objective on the bottom right of the screen.

blocks.heading: Eisengard Range — First Steps
blocks.content:
Head downhill from your starting position. You'll spot a shining object — examine it to receive Rean's equipment. The game then introduces the **Orbment** system; open the menu and equip your Master Quartz under the Orbment section.

Continue running down the hill to encounter your first monster. Touch it to engage in battle.

> **Tip:** Sneak up on monsters or stun them with your field attack (press **X** / **O** in Japanese version) for an **advantage** in battle — extra turns and reduced enemy HP.

After your first victory, the game introduces **Monster Notes**. Each defeated monster fills in additional data in the bestiary. To complete entries instantly, use a **Battle Scope** item, the **Analyze** quartz spell, or **Emma and Eliot's Detector ability**.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-first-battle | First Battle Complete -->

blocks.heading: Eisengard Range — Arts & Healing
blocks.content:
Continue east to trigger an event scene, then fight a rock-type creature. The game teaches you about **Arts** — this monster has high physical defense, so use the **Fire Bolt** spell to take it down quickly.

Further down the hill, Rean notices an **Orbment Charging Station**. Examine it to fully restore HP and EP. When ready, proceed to the next zone: **Eisengard Mountains 2**.

blocks.heading: Eisengard Range — S-Crafts & Exploration
blocks.content:
Head down the hill to find a treasure chest containing a **Tear** quartz. A short distance ahead, Rean spots a particularly strong monster. Engage it — this fight introduces the **S-Craft** system. S-Crafts are super attacks requiring 100–200 CP (found under the Craft section). You can also trigger them by pressing **Triangle** outside your turn, though this adds significant delay to your next action.

Explore the area thoroughly:
- **South corner:** Treasure chest with a **Teara Balm**
- **East area:** Event scene
- **Northeast corner:** Treasure box containing a **Proxy Puppet** accessory

Take the southeast exit to reach **Eisengard Mountain 3**. Immediately head south for a treasure box with a **Celestial Balm**, then find the **Orbment Charging Station** at the south end to heal up. When ready, proceed to the southeast end for a boss battle.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-eisengard-explored | Eisengard Range Explored -->
Maps in this guide are designed with the compass facing north.

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.heading: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.strategy:
The first boss is straightforward. Ortheim attacks with its sword.

**Attack:** Use **Flame Strike** to deal damage — it has a chance to inflict **Burn**, which helps expedite the fight.

**Healing:** Heal when Rean drops below 3000 HP with **Tear** or a **Teara Balm**. If the boss gets 2 consecutive turns, use a **Teara Balm** immediately.

**Victory:** Once you bring it under 15,000 HP, the battle ends automatically.

blocks.heading: Prologue Part B: Arriving in Ymir
blocks.content:
Watch the event scene — you'll be reunited with **Elise**, **Alfin**, and **Toval**. After the scene, leave the building. The game introduces the **event system**: **story events** are marked with a **red exclamation mark**, while **side events** use a **green exclamation mark**.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-ymir-arrival | Arrived in Ymir -->

blocks.heading: Ymir — Shopping & Exploration
blocks.content:
Head to the **General Store "Plover"** in the southwest corner of town. Purchase **Imperial Chronicle Issue #1** and **Gambler Jack Reprint Chapter 1** — there's a trophy for collecting all books in the game, so don't skip these.

<!-- missable: pro-book-chronicle-1 | Imperial Chronicle Issue #1 -->
<!-- missable: pro-book-gambler-1 | Gambler Jack Reprint Chapter 1 -->

blocks.heading: Ymir — Story Events
blocks.content:
Visit all the red exclamation mark locations around town:

**Rean's Parents** — Find **Lucia** and **Baron Schwarzer** at the **Baron's Mansion**.

**Elise and Celine** — They're at the **Footbath** in the center of town. Speaking to them adds the "Friends Note" to your menu; collecting all profile pages earns a bronze trophy.

**Toval** — He's at the **Inn & Pub "Valley Echo"**. While there, speak to pub owner **Gerald** for pancakes.

**Werner** — Find him in the kitchen area of **The Phoenix Wings** hotel (northeast on map). Speaking to him adds the recipe section to your menu and unlocks a new recipe.

**Princess Alfin** — She's at the **Septian Church**.

**Annabelle** — Located at **Ymir Canyon** entrance. She gives you a fishing rod (adds the fishing section to your menu). If you transferred a save from the original *Cold Steel*, she provides **Groundbait** based on your rank. You can also exchange prizes with her.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-ymir-events | Completed Ymir Events -->

blocks.heading: Ymir — Advancing the Story
blocks.content:
Once you've completed all activities, head to **The Phoenix Wings** hotel and speak to the receptionist, **Baggins**. Then go to the **Hot Springs** on the right side of the building.

> **Warning:** Entering the Hot Spring automatically advances the story. Finish all shopping and events before going in!

After the hot spring scene, **Elise** and **Toval** join your party. Go back inside the **Baron Mansion** and speak to **Alfin** for a short event. Before heading out, use the **footbath** at the center of town to fully restore your party's HP, EP, and CP. Then take the **northwest exit** to reach **Ymir Canyon**.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-ymir-departure | Left Ymir for Canyon -->

blocks.heading: Nightmare Mode Preparation
blocks.content:
If playing on Nightmare difficulty (or preparing for a tough run), stock up before entering the canyon:

- **Healing:** Aim for 15–20 **Teara Balms** and **Reviving Balms**
- **Farming:** Cook **Salty Onigiri** with Elise to create **Tri-Colored Onigiri** (superb result) — sell for 150 Mira each to fund supplies
- **Equipment:** Ensure all three characters have the best accessory from the store (boosts Strength, ATS, and Speed)
- **Consumables:** Invest remaining funds in **EP Charges**

blocks.heading: Ymir Canyon — Link Attacks
blocks.content: Watch the event scene upon entering the canyon. When you encounter the first monster, the game introduces **Link Attacks** — hitting enemies with the right attack type can cause them to become unbalanced, triggering a follow-up **Link Attack** for bonus damage. Finish off the first enemy and continue deeper into the canyon.

blocks.heading: Ymir Canyon — Exploration & Treasures
blocks.content:
Explore the first area thoroughly:

**Northeast end:** Open the treasure chest for the **Lighter** accessory.

**Northwest path:** Follow it to find a monster chest containing **Zeram Powder**. This fight has eight enemies — use **Toval's S-Craft** to kill all eight at once for the **Pieces of Eight** trophy.

<!-- missable: pro-pieces-of-eight | Pieces of Eight Trophy -->

Backtrack south and cross the bridge heading east. Pick up the **U-Material x3** from the chest at the east end. Then take the **north exit** to reach **Ymir Canyon 2**.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-ymir-canyon-1 | Ymir Canyon 1 Complete -->

blocks.heading: Ymir Canyon 2 — To the Boss
blocks.content:
Grab the **Tearal Balm** from the chest as you head north. Take the northwest path where it splits:

- **South fork:** Treasure box with a **Poison Quartz**
- **North fork:** Follow it all the way to find a chest with **Sepith (All Colors x50)**, then continue just a bit further to reach an **Orbment Charging Station** — heal up completely before proceeding to the next area for the boss fight.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-ymir-canyon-2 | Ymir Canyon 2 Complete -->

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim (Ymir Canyon)
blocks.heading: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim (Ymir Canyon)
blocks.strategy:
Ortheim is significantly tougher this time around.

**Boss Skills:**
- **Sword Slash:** Hits everyone in front
- **Ground Stab:** Targets a large area around the boss
- **Boost:** Grants **STR 50% Up** and restores **15,000 HP**

**Strategy:**
- **Buff management:** When Ortheim uses Boost, it gains 50% attack power AND heals 20% of its HP — this prolongs the fight significantly. Push damage hard before it buffs.
- **Healing:** Use **Elise** as your dedicated healer with **Holy Squall** (restores 60% HP in a small radius) or **Tear** for single-target recovery.
- **DPS:** **Rean** and **Toval** are your main damage dealers. Rely on physical attacks and save your **S-Crafts** for turns with a critical bonus for maximum impact.

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2) — Ashen Knight, Valimar
blocks.heading: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2) — Ashen Knight, Valimar
blocks.strategy:
This is your introduction to **Divine Knight (mech) combat**, which works like rock-paper-scissors — you select a body part to attack and try to find the weak point.

**Stances & Weak Points:**
- **Idle Stance:** Attack the **Head** (★★★★ effectiveness)
- **Attack Stance:** Attack the **Arms** (★★★★ effectiveness)

Landing a hit on the correct body part scores a **critical hit**, allowing you to perform a **Link Attack** for bonus damage. Follow the stance pattern above and this fight is straightforward.

<!-- checkpoint: pro-valimar-victory | Defeated Ortheim with Valimar -->

checkpoints.label: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2) — Ashen Knight, Valimar

blocks.heading: December 1st — Ymir Preparations
blocks.content:
As soon as you gain control of **Rean**, you'll notice the addition of **Quick Travel** under the navigation menu. Before heading out, there are a few important stops in town.

Head to the **General Store** and speak to **Raio** (the shopkeeper on the right). He'll explain the weapon synthesis system and how to unlock additional Orbment slots — the Orbment system lets you upgrade slots to equip more potent Quartz.

Next, speak to **Camillia** nearby to trigger an event scene that unlocks the **Item Trading** function (works like a pawn shop). On a second playthrough, she'll also allow trading Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials.

Before leaving town through Ymir Canyon, visit the **Station** and speak to **Luke** near the wreckage — he provides some **Tear Balms** for the road.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-december-1 | December 1st: Left Ymir -->

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park — High Elements
blocks.content:
After the event scene, you'll be warped into **Lunaria Nature Park**. Head south toward **Lunaria Nature Park 3**.

This area introduces **High Elements** (Time, Space, and Mirage) — these affect monsters and turn order, which can be either an advantage or a disadvantage depending on the matchup.

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park 3 — Exploration
blocks.content: Check the **southeast corner** for a treasure chest containing a **Stone Brooch**, then the **southwest corner** for a treasure box with **Sepith Mass x100**. Take the southeast exit to continue to **Lunaria Nature Park 2**.

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park 2 — Treasures & Fishing
blocks.content:
This area has several valuable pickups. At the **west end**, grab the **Teara Balm** from the treasure box — there's also a fishing spot nearby. At the **east end**, find a **Citrus Bottle** in a treasure chest.

Cross the bridge heading south, then check the **west corner** for a monster chest containing the **Scepter** Master Quartz (be ready for a fight). In the **east area**, pick up an **EP Charge II**.

Take the south exit to reach **Lunaria Nature Park 1**.

blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park 1 — Boss Ahead
blocks.content:
Grab the **HP 1** quartz from the treasure chest in the **northeast corner** (east side), then pick up **Sepith x100** from the **southwest corner**. In the center path heading south, you'll find an **Orbment Charging Station** — heal up fully before leaving the park, as a boss awaits at the exit.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-lunaria-complete | Lunaria Nature Park Complete -->

blocks.name: Grunoja
blocks.heading: Boss: Grunoja
blocks.strategy:
This fight introduces the **Overdrive** mechanic. Activate it by highlighting the attack icon, holding the Right button when it changes icon, and pressing Confirm. Overdrive restores HP, EP, CP, grants 3 extra turns, and allows instant magic casts between linked characters.

Buff up your characters and go on the offensive. Grunoja can buff itself, inflict **Seal** (paralyze), and hit hard with physical attacks.

**Recommendation:** Use Toval's wind magic for big damage. Have Rean use **Autumn Leaf Cutter** or **Arc Slash** to delay the boss's turns. If CP is maxed, save your S-Craft for when the boss's HP is low to finish it off quickly.

blocks.heading: West Celdic Highway & East Trista Highway
blocks.content:
After defeating Grunoja, leave the park and enter the **farmhouse on the east side**. Speak to the residents inside for an event scene. Head south and check the **southwest corner** for two treasure chests.

Take the south exit for a short scene, then head west. Pick up the treasure chest near the small tower and take the **southwest exit** to reach **East Trista Highway**. This is a very short area — grab the 3 treasure chests (including **EP Charge I**, **Earth Lance**, and **Curia Balm**) and check the fishing location to the west. Near the bridge, an event scene plays where Rean notices guards.

Return to West Celdic Highway and take the **southeast exit** to reach **Celdic**.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-highways-complete | Reached Celdic -->

blocks.heading: Treasure List: Highways
rows: EP Charge I / Earth Lance / Curia Balm

blocks.heading: Celdic — Reuniting with Friends
blocks.content:
When you enter Celdic, three key story events await (marked with red exclamation marks). Visit **Becky** at the Celdic House near the West Celdic Highway entrance, **Margot** at the Weathercock Inn (behind the counter), and **Rosine** at the Grand Market.

After speaking with all three, an event scene unfolds and Rean purchases **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2**. Read it and exit to trigger another event.

<!-- collectible: a1p1-chronicle-2 | Imperial Chronicle Issue #2 -->

Now head to the **Grand Market** and buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** from Cornette's shop (center of market). On a second playthrough, also grab **Black Records #2** from the same shop.

<!-- missable: a1p1-gambler-jack-2 | Gambler Jack Reprint #2 -->

Visit the **Chapel** on the west end and speak with **Moulbaix** — she teaches you the recipe for **Fresh Vegetable Juice**.

When ready, head toward **East Celdic Highway**.

blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway — Machias Joins
blocks.content:
Head **north** to locate a treasure chest containing **Silver Earrings**. Then go to the **northeast corner** and talk to **Tarim** (NPC near the farmhouse) — he gives you **Gambler Jack II Chapter 1**.

<!-- missable: a1p1-gambler-jack-ii-1 | Gambler Jack II - Chapter 1 -->

> **Note:** Collect all 14 volumes of Gambler Jack II to exchange for the strongest weapon later. If missed, they can sometimes be found via Inspect Curios (unreliable).

Check the **southeast bridge** area for a fishing spot and a treasure chest that triggers an event where Rean finds an **Old Key**. Head to the **Windmill** in the center-south area and watch the event scene — **Machias** joins your party.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-machias-joins | Machias Joined Party -->

blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway — Quests & AP
blocks.content:
Return to Celdic and visit the **Market Manager's House**. Speak to **Manager Otto** — this adds the Quest section to your Notebook and introduces the **AP (Academic Points)** system. Your goal is to max AP each chapter for **S Rank**.

While in town, visit the **Chapel** and talk to **Rosine**. She gives you 3 **Tear Balms** and adds page 1 to her profile.

blocks.name: Munch no More
blocks.content: Speak to Manager Otto in Celdic to accept. Head to **East Celdic Highway 2** (northeast corner) to find the quest monster. Defeat it and return to Manager Otto to report.
blocks.reward: Detection Quartz (displays all treasure chests on mini-map), 1500 Mira, 4 AP

blocks.name: Giant Crop Muncher
blocks.heading: Quest Boss: Giant Crop Muncher
blocks.strategy: The boss spawns with 7 Crop Muncher minions. Focus area-of-effect attacks to clear the adds first, then concentrate damage on the main target. Fire-element attacks deal bonus damage (120% efficacy). Water is slightly resisted (90%).

blocks.name: Herbal Remedies
blocks.content: Speak to **Father Zirbel** behind the altar at the **Celdic Chapel**. He needs a cure herb. Go to the **Grand Market** and speak to **Flint** (northwest stall) for information. Head to **West Celdic Highway** north near the Lunaria Nature Park entrance and speak to **Johnson** (NPC near the gate). Enter **Lunaria Nature Park** and find the **Cure Herb** at the northeast corner (near a treasure chest). Return to Father Zirbel with the herb.
blocks.reward: Teara Balm x2, Celestial Balm x2, 4 AP

blocks.heading: Advancing the Story — Party Expansion
blocks.content:
With both quests complete, exit Celdic and head to **East Celdic Highway**. Enter the **Windmill** on the south side and examine the communication device — select the **2nd choice**. Head to the rendezvous at **Point D** (East Celdic Highway 3, northeast end).

**Eliot** and **Fie** join your party here. Overdrive now works between Rean and his friends. For other character pairs, clear Trial Chests to unlock their Overdrive. The Burst function and party switching are also now available.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-party-expanded | Eliot & Fie Joined -->

blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway 3 — Trial Chest
blocks.content:
Explore the area: grab **Sepith Mass x100** from the **northeast corner**, then head to the **southwest area** for several treasure chests. Look for the **Blue Treasure Chest (Trial Chest)** — this requires your prearranged party to use Overdrive to complete.

> **Tip:** Equip a **Faint Resistant** accessory (the Citrus Bottle from Lunaria Park helps) — the trial boss uses faint-inducing attacks.

In the **southwest exit** area, defeat the monster chest for a **Gladiator Headband**. When ready, take the **southeast exit** to reach Twin Dragons Bridge.

blocks.name: Senior Bear Mole (Trial Chest)
blocks.heading: Trial Chest: Senior Bear Mole
blocks.strategy: The Senior Bear Mole uses **Hammer Swing** (knockback + faint) and **Jump Slam** (faint). Wait for the smaller moles to gather together, then use an S-Craft to wipe them out. **Machias** can inflict Petrify with Petrify Shell, and **Eliot** serves as your area attacker and healer.

blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge — Waiting Lounge
blocks.content:
Head to the **Waiting Lounge** on the north side and speak to **Morize** in the northwest corner — she teaches you the **Cheese Omelet** recipe. Go near the bridge to witness a merchant arguing with a soldier (event scene). Examine the duct to advance the story and access the Garrelia Side.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-twin-dragons | Reached Twin Dragons Bridge -->

blocks.name: A Cry For Help
blocks.content:
After the merchant/soldier event at Twin Dragons Bridge, leave and head north near **East Celdic Highway 2**. Go to **East Celdic Highway 3** (near the 100 Sepith Mass chest) to find travelers being attacked by monsters. Defeat the monsters and select the **1st choice** to return to Twin Dragons Bridge.

Back at the bridge, speak to the three merchants (Left, Center, Right) in the Waiting Lounge. Then go to the east side of the building for a completion event.

blocks.heading: Garrelia Byroad — Merchant & Trials
blocks.content:
On the Garrelia side, find the **merchant under the bridge** — purchase the **Contact Lens** costume attachment here (cheaper than exchanging U-Material later). Explore the area for treasure: a **Celestial Balm** on the northwest path and a **Defense 2** quartz at the north end. Clear the **Trial Chest** here to unlock Overdrive for Eliot and Fie.

Continue to **Garrelia Byroad 2**. Pick up the **Holy Chain** from the south path treasure chest, an **EP Charge I** on the north path, and defeat the monster chest at the southeast end for a **Reaper Quartz**. The **Garrelia Fortress** entrance is to the northeast — heal at the Orbment Station and **save your game** before proceeding.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-garrelia-fortress | Reached Garrelia Fortress -->

blocks.name: Xeno & Leonidas
blocks.heading: Boss: Xeno & Leonidas (Story Battle)

stats.Objective: Reduce one boss's HP to 30% or below by turn 40 for 3 Bonus AP

blocks.strategy:
This is an unwinnable story battle — your goal is to deal as much damage as possible within 40 turns. Start with full CP on everyone.

**Strategy:** Buff Rean immediately, then unleash S-Crafts and Overdrive. Use AT Delay skills like **Arc Slash** and **Bullet Cyclone** to push back enemy turns. Keep Eliot as your main healer — watch for enemy S-Crafts that deal ~70% of your HP.

> **Trophy:** Scan the mines that appear during battle for the Battle Trophy.

Reducing either boss to 30% HP or below earns **3 AP**.

blocks.name: Drakkhen (Sword & Gun)
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Drakkhen
blocks.strategy:
Focus on one Drakkhen at a time.

**Drakkhen (Sword):** Attack the **Body** in Idle Stance, **Head** in Offensive Stance.

**Drakkhen (Gun):** Has Backup Pilot mode active. Attack the **Head** in Idle Stance, **Body** in Offensive Stance.

Victory rewards 100 Link EXP between partners.

blocks.heading: After the Battle — Garrelia Fortress
blocks.content:
After the battle, explore the **Resting Area** to the north. Speak to **Arbekker** to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 2**. Talk to **Monica** at the General Store and **Munk** at the Dining area to add their profiles to your notebook. When ready, examine **Valimar** and select the 1st choice to advance the story.

<!-- missable: a1p1-gambler-jack-ii-2 | Gambler Jack II - Chapter 2 -->
<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-dec-4-start | Completed December 1st -->

**December 4th — Missable content ahead!** Purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe from the General Store and complete the hidden quest **Leaf it to Me** before ending the day. Bonding events with **Machias** and **Claire** add profile pages.

blocks.heading: December 4th — Bonding Events
blocks.content:
Bonding events are marked with a **yellow exclamation mark** on the map. These require **Bonding Points**, which are limited on a first playthrough — choose carefully who to spend them on.

Attending **Machias** and **Claire's** events adds pages to their profiles (relevant for completion). All bonding events grant **Link EXP +500** with that character.

blocks.heading: Bonding Event List
rows: Adds Page 1 to Profile. Link EXP +500
Adds Page 1 to Profile. Link EXP +500

blocks.heading: December 4th — Shopping & Activities
blocks.content:
Visit the **General Store** and purchase the **Tomato Jelly** recipe — this is missable if you advance the story without buying it.

<!-- missable: a1p1-tomato-jelly | Tomato Jelly Recipe -->

You can also try the **Snowboard Mini-Game** by exiting town via the southeast exit.

blocks.name: Leaf it to Me
blocks.content:
Speak to **Alf & Kiki** (the kids near the station) and choose the **1st option** (Offer assistance). Head to **Ymir Valley** to find two colored leaves:

1. **Leaf 1:** Northwest corner of Ymir Valley 1
2. **Leaf 2:** Upper southeast corner of Ymir Valley 2 (near the treasure chest)

Return to Alf & Kiki to complete the quest.

> **Trophy:** Scan the monkey-like monster in Ymir Valley for the Battle Trophy.

blocks.heading: End of Part 1
blocks.content:
Once you've completed all activities, bonding events, and quests, head to your room at the **Baron's Mansion**. Select the **1st choice** to end Part 1.

The game tallies all AP earned throughout Part 1. The **S-Rank requirement** is **35 AP total**.

<!-- checkpoint: a1p1-complete | Act 1 Part 1 Complete -->

blocks.heading: AP Breakdown (S-Rank: 35 AP)
rows: Fight against Xeno and Leonidas (30% HP)

blocks.heading: Party Setup & Departure
blocks.content: On December 5th, leave Ymir through the valley to begin the Nord Highlands expedition. You must choose **two** members from Class VII plus **one** guest—either **Claire** or **Toval**. This choice is permanent for the segment, so pick carefully. Toval and Claire both bring powerful S-Crafts that trivialize early boss encounters; Claire's AoE damage pairs well with a physical team, while Toval's support works best if you're relying on arts-heavy characters.

blocks.heading: Zender Gate Arrival
blocks.content: After warping to the northwest of Nord Highlands - South, make your way to **Zender Gate**. Trigger the event near the stables to receive a **Horse** for faster overworld traversal. Inside the Mess Hall, speak to **Marx** to learn the **Potato Croquette** recipe. Visit the weapon shop to buy upgraded weapons—skip armor purchases here since better options await at Lake Lacrima. While exploring, find **Beryl** in the Mess Hall and **Mint** outside. Note that the southeast area is currently locked; you'll return later for treasure chests after unlocking it.

checkpoints.label: Learned Potato Croquette recipe from Marx

blocks.heading: Nord Settlement & Jaeger Ambush
blocks.content: Head northeast from Zender Gate toward the **Nord Settlement**. Upon arrival, a scene triggers leading directly into a boss fight against a pair of Jaegers. These enemies are extremely dangerous—the Greatsword variant deals 2,000-3,500 damage per hit and both can resurrect each other, creating deadly chains if you don't eliminate them quickly.

blocks.name: Jaegers (Greatsword & Rifle)
blocks.heading: Boss: Jaegers

stats.Jaeger - Greatsword: HP 11,229 | No weakness (resists all) | Drops: Curia Balm, Reviving Balm
stats.Jaeger - Rifle: HP 10,488 | No weakness (resists all) | Drops: Teara Balm, EP Charge II

blocks.strategy: Enter with full CP and unleash S-Crafts immediately—Toval's or Claire's S-Craft can nearly one-shot a Jaeger. Focus fire on one target to prevent resurrection chains. Buff your party's attack beforehand if possible. The key danger is allowing both to survive multiple turns, as they will revive each other indefinitely.

blocks.heading: Lake Lacrima & Gaius
blocks.content: After defeating the Jaegers, proceed to **Lake Lacrima** where **Gaius** officially joins your party. Visit the **Elder's House** and speak to **Old Lady Jedah** to learn the **Hot Milk Tea** recipe. In the **Doctor's House**, talk to **San** (standing next to Dr. Amr) to obtain **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3**. At the **General Store**, purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #3**. Fishing is available at the pier if you want to pursue that activity.

checkpoints.label: Learned Hot Milk Tea recipe from Old Lady Jedah
Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3 from San

blocks.heading: Nord Highlands - North & Northeast
blocks.content: From Lake Lacrima, head to **Nord Highlands - Northeast** via the southeast exit. Gaius blocks the southern path, funneling you through the correct route. Pick up the **Floral Bottle** in the south corner and the **Harvest** quartz in the north area. Continue northeast until you encounter the mini-boss **Unsurtr** guarding the passage.

blocks.name: Unsurtr
blocks.heading: Boss: Unsurtr

stats.Unsurtr: HP 48,360 | Weakness: Fire (150%) | Danger: Frost Edge and Icicle Missiles inflict Freeze

blocks.strategy: Equip **Freeze-resistant** accessories on your entire party before engaging. Alisa's *Heavenly Gift* provides CP regeneration and **Insight** (dodge buff), making her invaluable here. Exploit the Fire weakness with arts like Alisa's *Heatwave* and finish with S-Crafts. Keep your party spread to avoid multi-target Icicle Missiles hitting everyone.

blocks.heading: Post-Boss: Fast Travel & Trial Chest
blocks.content: After defeating Unsurtr, you're returned to Lake Lacrima and **fast travel** is now unlocked across all Nord Highland zones. Head to **Nord Highlands - North (Center)** to find a **Trial Chest** that unlocks **Overdrive** for Alisa and Millium. Speak to the **Elder** back at Lake Lacrima to receive the side quest listings.

checkpoints.label: Unlocked Overdrive for Alisa & Millium (Trial Chest)

blocks.name: Highlands Hunt
blocks.content: Defeat **3 groups** of **Galion Cougar** scattered across Nord Highlands - North. These enemies appear as regular encounters on the field—look for the cougar-type enemies and engage them. All three groups must be defeated before returning to Lacan.
blocks.reward: Nord Bracelet, All Monster Ingredients x3, 1,500 Mira, **4 AP**

blocks.name: Foaling Around
blocks.content:
Track down a missing foal across three locations:
1. Southeast corner of Nord Highlands - Northeast
2. Northeast end of Nord Highlands - Northeast
3. Nord Settlement

The foal moves between these locations in sequence. Use the Horse for faster traversal between zones.

blocks.heading: Aria Shrine Dungeon
blocks.content: The Aria Shrine entrance is located in **Nord Highlands - Northeast**. Clearing it earns **3 AP**. Inside, collect the Trial Chest (unlocks Overdrive for Alisa & Gaius), plus **Aerial** quartz, **Sleep** quartz, **EP Charge II**, **Sepith Mass**, and the **Criminal** Master Quartz. Work through the floors until you reach the boss chamber.

checkpoints.label: Unlocked Overdrive for Alisa & Gaius (Trial Chest)

blocks.name: Tildawn - Pazuu x3
blocks.heading: Boss: Tildawn (Aria Shrine)

stats.Tildawn: Weakness: Time, Space, Mirage | Danger: Black Energy inflicts Sleep; Aerial (Wind art) deals massive damage

blocks.strategy: Equip **Sleep-resistant** accessories. Use **Impede** arts to cancel enemy casting—their Wind arts hit devastatingly hard if allowed to resolve. Gaius can tank with *Insight* active while Alisa heals and regenerates CP for the party. Focus down one Pazuu at a time to reduce incoming damage quickly.

blocks.name: Zats Amore
blocks.client: Zats or Manning (Zender Gates, Store Area)
blocks.content: Examine **4 tank wrecks** in Nord Highlands - South. They are marked with green exclamation points on the map. The 4th wreck contains a **pendant**—retrieve it and return it to Zats at Zender Gate.

items.label: Speak to **Officer Ogram** (Zender Gates) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4**
Open the **Trial Chest** in the now-unlocked southeast area of Nord Highlands - South

blocks.heading: Watchtower Dungeon
blocks.content: Enter the Watchtower via the southeast corner of Nord Highlands - South (red exclamation mark on map). Enemies inside include **Alliance Soldiers** (weak to **Seal**) and **Mercenaries**. The dungeon spans four floors with a duct system connecting some areas. Collect the following loot as you ascend: **Wind Shoes** (1F), **La Forte** quartz (1F Duct), **Sepith x100** (2F), **Attack 2** quartz (3F Duct), and **EP Charge II** (4F). At the top, you face Bleublanc and Altina.

blocks.name: Bleublanc & Altina
blocks.heading: Boss: Bleublanc & Altina

stats.Bleublanc: Defeat within 40 turns for bonus 3 AP

blocks.strategy: Enter with full CP and unleash all S-Crafts immediately to burst down Bleublanc. Use **Alisa's Heavenly Gift** mid-fight for CP regeneration. When Altina activates *Black Barrier*, hit her once with a basic attack to strip it before using craft damage. Defeat any summoned adds immediately—they can overwhelm your party if left alive. The 40-turn condition is generous if you front-load damage.

blocks.name: Drakkhen & Spiegel
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Drakkhen & Spiegel

stats.Spiegel: Target the body regardless of stance

blocks.strategy: Focus one unit at a time—splitting damage is inefficient. Use **Fie's** speed buff for extra turns in mech combat. When EP runs low, use the co-pilot **Shinki** to heal or **Charge** for CP. Always target the **body** of the Spiegel unit regardless of its current stance; other target points are less efficient.

blocks.heading: December 8th: Ymir Town
blocks.content: After the Watchtower events, you return to Ymir on December 8th. Visit **Camilla's General Store** to start the hidden quest *Azuki's Adventure*, buy the **Onion Soup** recipe, and purchase **Imperial Chronicle Issue #3**. At the residence southeast of the Tavern, speak to **Masha** for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5**. Try the **Snowboard Mini-Game** on the new difficulty to earn the **Hare** quartz. For character profiles: find **Claire** southeast of Baron's Mansion (Page 2), attend **Sharon's** bonding event in the Baron's Mansion Kitchen (Page 1), and find **Toval** near the Station (Page 2). Check **Ymir Valley** for the new **Snow Rat** monster—scan it for the monster trophy.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5 from Masha
Won Snowboard new difficulty for Hare quartz
Scanned Snow Rat in Ymir Valley

blocks.name: Azuki's Adventure
blocks.content:
Speak to these 4 NPCs in order:
1. **Werner** (Phoenix Wings Kitchen)
2. **Gerald** (Tavern, behind counter)
3. **Luke** (Near Station)
4. **Sister Lisa** (Septian Church)

Return to Camilla after speaking to all four.

blocks.heading: Completing Act 1 - Part 2
blocks.content: After finishing all side content, quests, and town activities, return to your room in the Baron's Mansion to end the day. If you completed everything listed above, you'll achieve the **S-Rank** with exactly 35 AP. Make sure you haven't missed any hidden quests—Zats Amore and Azuki's Adventure are easy to overlook.

blocks.heading: Party Selection & Preparation
blocks.content:
On December 9th, select your party before departing Ymir. If you've been fishing, your rank should have increased—speak to **Annabelle** at the general store for a new fishing rod. Choose **two Class VII members** and **one guest character** (Claire, Sharon, or Toval). This choice is permanent for the segment.

**Important:** This is the *only* segment where **Sharon** is available as a guest. If you skip her now, you won't get another chance until New Game+. The recommended party is **Alisa** and **Sharon**—Sharon's devastating crafts combined with Alisa's CP battery support make them an exceptionally powerful pairing. Once ready, exit via **Ymir Valley**.

blocks.heading: Ebel Highway
blocks.content: You arrive at **Ebel Highway 2**. Immediately pick up the **Flame Tongue** quartz near Valimar's landing point. Head south toward **Legram**—the game restricts full exploration of the highway for now, so don't worry about unreachable chests. You'll return later to collect the **Burn** quartz (Highway 2), **Celestial Balm**, **EP Charge II**, **Blue Scaled Mail** (Highway 1), and other treasures scattered across the various zones.

blocks.heading: Legram Town
blocks.content:
Watch the event scene at the **Bracer Guild**. Head to **Aprikoze Inn** and speak to **Weiber** behind the counter to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6**. Take the inn's back door outside and talk to **Old Man Bem** to learn the **Seafood Pilaf** recipe. Visit the **General Store** to purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #4** and stock up on equipment upgrades.

While in town, find **Vivi** at the Church and **Casper** at the Training School (Thors Academy students). A fishing spot is available at the harbor near **Klaus**. When you're ready to advance, speak to **Klaus** to travel to **Lohengrin Castle**. Climb the hill and enter—a boss fight triggers shortly after.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6 from Weiber
Learned Seafood Pilaf recipe from Old Man Bem

blocks.name: Zelvenom
blocks.heading: Boss: Zelvenom (Lohengrin Castle)

stats.Zelvenom: HP 45,225 | Weakness: Mirage (140%), Slash (★★★☆) | Skills: Poison Breath (Area L, inflicts Poison), Tail Swipe (Area L, push back)

blocks.strategy: This boss is relatively easy. Its poor Slash resistance makes **Laura** and **Rean** the ideal damage dealers. **Mirage** arts (Emma) also hit hard at 140% efficacy. The main threat is Poison Breath—a large AoE that inflicts Poison. If **Sharon** is in your party, her area healing craft removes status ailments and trivializes the fight entirely. Status ailments also work well against Zelvenom, so feel free to Seal or Blind it for safety.

blocks.heading: Post-Boss: Laura & Emma Join
blocks.content: After the event scene following Zelvenom, **Laura** and **Emma** officially join your active party. Return to **Legram** and head to the **Bracer Guild** (southeast area) to speak with **Miles**, who will make side quests available. Complete these before moving on.

checkpoints.label: Laura and Emma joined the party

blocks.name: Arseid School Bout 2
blocks.client: Klaus or Gaveli (Arseid School Training Hall)
blocks.content:
The Arseid School students want a rematch. Rean and Laura are mandatory for this fight; choose two additional party members (guest characters are NOT allowed).

**Opponents:** Fritz (36,352 HP), Ares (27,440 HP), Gaveli (36,707 HP), Datt (27,440 HP)

**Strategy:** All students are vulnerable to status ailments. Laura has a high chance of inflicting Faint, and Rean's *Gale* can Seal them. Blind also works well. Be warned: when their HP drops low, they buff and heal, then unleash dangerous area skills dealing 5,000+ damage. Either burst them down quickly with S-Crafts before they can buff, or systematically apply status locks to prevent their power-up phase.

blocks.name: Ebel Rebel
blocks.content:
Head to **Ebel Highway 2** near the entrance to Highway 3. Equip **Faint-resistant** accessories before engaging.

**Boss: Gordi Schnarr G** — HP 98,467 | Weakness: Fire (140%) | Slash (★★☆☆)
- *Slam:* Area (M), inflicts Faint
- *Roar:* Self-heal + STR/SPD +50%
- *Charge Slam:* 2-turn charge, inflicts Faint (can be cancelled with Impede)

**Strategy:** This boss has massive HP and uses *Drumming* to buff STR/DEF/SPD, enabling devastating multi-hits. When the buff expires, it unleashes *Hard Hit* for nearly 7,000 damage. Use **Fire arts** for maximum damage and Overdrive for instant casting. At ~50% HP, spam S-Crafts before it can re-buff. Report to **Miles** at the Bracer Guild after winning.

blocks.heading: Ebel Highway 3 & Aqua Shrine Entrance
blocks.content: Return to **Ebel Highway**. Take the north exit to reach **Ebel Highway 2** and examine **Valimar** for a short event scene. Continue via the northeast exit to **Ebel Highway 3**. From there, take the **northwest exit** to reach the **Aqua Shrine**. Clearing this dungeon earns **3 bonus AP**. There's also a fishing spot near the waterfall outside the shrine entrance.

blocks.heading: Aqua Shrine Exploration
blocks.content:
Head downstairs and open the gate to enter the shrine proper. Follow the west path to the **northwest corner** and press the switch to lower the water level. With the water lowered, follow the west path again then go all the way east to find a **Trial Chest**—defeat the guardian for a reward. Next, follow the south path until you see stairs; before descending, take the **north path** to find a monster chest containing the **Scent** quartz.

Backtrack to the south stairs and collect the **Blue Scaled Shoes** from a treasure box. Proceed to the west side and open a chest for **EP Charge II**, then push the nearby switch to raise the water level again. Finally, take the center path to the northwest area to reach the shrine boss.

blocks.name: King Crysnetic
blocks.heading: Trial Chest: King Crysnetic

stats.King Crysnetic: HP 33,157 | Drop: Shining R | Mobs use Mute-inflicting AoE attacks

blocks.strategy: A straightforward fight. The adds cast area attacks that inflict **Mute**, which can lock out your arts. Use **Laura's S-Craft** or *Brilliant Spin* to clear mobs quickly, then focus the boss with Emma's Arts and Laura's physical attacks.

blocks.name: Tildawn Glacia x3
blocks.heading: Boss: Tildawn Glacia x3 (Aqua Shrine)

stats.Tildawn Glacia: HP 43,097 each | Absorbs Water (0%) | Weakness: Fire (120%), Time (130%), Space (130%), Mirage (130%) | Inflicts Mute

blocks.strategy: Similar to previous Tildawn fights but these inflict **Mute** instead of Sleep. If your party relies on magic, this is extremely dangerous—use **Impede** crafts (available on Rean, Machias, Alisa, Fie) to cancel their casting and earn Tactic Bonuses. To cheese the fight: put Rean in Overdrive, use *Motivate* twice for full CP, then chain S-Crafts to wipe them before Mute becomes a problem. Drops: Curia Balm, U-Material.

blocks.heading: South Kreuzen Highway
blocks.content: After the shrine boss, take the portal to exit. Collect any remaining chests in Ebel Highway 3, then proceed via the **northeast exit** to **South Kreuzen Highway**. Move forward for a short bridge scene. In the **northwest corner**, find a fishing spot and the **Hydro Cannon** quartz. The **northeast corner** has a **Sepith Mass** chest. At the split path in the north region, the west route has a **Tearal Balm** while the east route leads to a monster chest containing the **Tauros** Master Quartz. Return to center and take the north exit toward **Bareahard**.
⚠️ **Point of No Return:** Entering Bareahard advances the story. Complete all Legram side quests (Arseid School Bout 2, Ebel Rebel) and the Aqua Shrine before proceeding.

items.label: Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #5** at Fortnum Books (Christie's Galleria 2F)
Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #6** at Fortnum Books (Christie's Galleria 2F)
Speak to **Saffron** (Station Street) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 7**
**Black Records #3** — Underground Waterway after Abyss Drome (New Game+ only)
Learn **Fluffy Pancake** recipe from **Calmin** (Sorciere Restaurant)
Complete Hidden Quest: **Missin' Kitten** (Old Lady Eva, Central Plaza)
Complete Hidden Quest: **St. Veronica's Tears** (Sister Tatiana, Cathedral)

blocks.heading: Bareahard: Equipment & Shopping
blocks.content:
At **Valenty Tailoring** (Artisan's Street), buy the **Patterned Shirt** (20% evasion—ideal for dodge tanks like Fie or Sharon) and **Leather Sandal** (high speed). Visit **Turner's Jewelers** (also Artisan's Street) to stock up on Pendulums for status resistance: Red x3, Green x3, Blue x4, Yellow x4, Dark x4 at 3,000 Mira each (54,000 total). If you're short on funds, cook and sell **Tri-colored Onigiri** using Sharon's recipes.

For collectibles: speak to **Colette** at Turner's Jewelers, then visit **Sorciere Restaurant** and talk to **Calmin** to learn the **Fluffy Pancake** recipe. On Station Street, find **Saffron** for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 7**, then buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #5** and **#6** at **Fortnum Books** (Christie's Galleria 2F). Also speak to **Theresia** by the bench nearby.

checkpoints.label: Bought Patterned Shirt at Valenty Tailoring
Stocked up on Pendulums at Turner's Jewelers

blocks.name: Missin' Kitten
blocks.client: Old Lady Eva (Central Plaza, near Underground Waterway)
blocks.content:
Speak to **Old Lady Eva** to start the quest, then talk to the following marked NPCs:
- **Hasan** — Dining tables by Sorciere Restaurant
- **Biske** — Artisan's Street (near South Kreuzen Highway entrance)
- **Female Student** — Station Street (center of map)

After gathering information, exit to **North Kreuzen Highway** and find the kitten at the north end. Note: the fishing spot here is blocked until Act 2. Return to Bareahard and speak to the cat again to trigger a scene with Celine.

blocks.name: St. Veronica's Tears
blocks.content:
Go to **Bareahard Cathedral** (north end of Central Plaza) and speak to **Sister Tatiana** in the west room. Examine the statue at the center of the plaza, then head to **Station Street** and take the east stairs down to the **Underground Waterway**.

**Underground Waterway 1:** Follow the east path to the northwest corner. Open the chest for a **Green Pendulum**, then press the switch to unlock the gate.
**Underground Waterway 2:** Go north for Sepith, then take the west path to the center for the boss fight.

**Boss: Abyss Drome** (+ 7 Sludge Dromes) — HP 88,111
The Dromes cast high-damage magic. Use **Impede** crafts to cancel their casting for Tactic Bonuses. If the adds become too dangerous, wipe them with S-Crafts. The boss weakens ADF; cancelling its arts is critical to prevent devastating damage.

*New Game+:* After the fight, find **Black Records #3** in the Abyss Drome area.

blocks.heading: Advancing the Story (Noble District)
blocks.content: Once all side activities are complete, head to the **Noble District** and approach the **Duke Albarea Mansion** for a story scene. Afterward, visit **Sorciere Restaurant** and speak to **Hammond**. Finally, go to **Station Street** and take the south exit toward **Bareahard Airport**. This advances the story—make absolutely sure all shopping, quests, and missable items are done before proceeding.

blocks.heading: Bareahard Airport
blocks.content: In the airport's **Hold** (downstairs), find the **Freeze** quartz. Head to **3F (Lounge)** for the racing mini-game against **Jusis** (19,500 HP). Winning earns **2 AP**—retry if you lose, as there's no penalty. After the mini-game, a major boss battle begins.

checkpoints.label: Won racing mini-game against Jusis (2 AP)

blocks.name: Duvalie & McBurn
blocks.heading: Boss: Duvalie & McBurn
blocks.strategy: The **bonus condition** for 3 extra AP is to defeat **Duvalie** before McBurn overwhelms your party. Ignore McBurn entirely—he's designed to be unkillable. Buff your party's strength immediately, then unleash all S-Crafts on Duvalie. If CP is depleted, use **Zeram Powder** to revive party members with 100 CP for additional S-Crafts. Scan both enemies for bestiary entries. An alternate scene triggers if you manage to bring Duvalie down. After this fight, an unwinnable mech battle follows.

blocks.name: Hector & Armored Vehicle NP-II
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Hector & NP-II

stats.Armored Vehicle NP-II: Lowest HP, 3-star unbalance weakness in attack stance
stats.Hector: Attack head in idle stance, body in attack stance

blocks.strategy: Defeat the **Armored Vehicle** first since it has the lowest HP and a 3-star unbalance weakness when in attack stance. Once it's down, focus on **Hector**—target the head during its idle stance and the body during attack stance. After victory, you'll reach a save point followed by a hot spring scene. Choose a partner for **600 Link EXP**.

blocks.heading: December 12: Bonding Events & Activities
blocks.content:
December 12th features **double bonding events**—the only day in the game with this bonus. You have **7 bonding points** to spend. Prioritize events for **Alisa, Emma, Fie, Laura, Millium**, and **Sharon** to unlock their profile pages. Attending **Gaius's** event teaches the **Hunter Wing** craft (which otherwise requires Link Level 75).

Try the **Snowboard** mini-game on its new difficulty to earn the **Passion Leggings** and a new snowboard. Check **Ymir Valley** for the new monster **Icicle Penguin**—scan it for the monster trophy.

**New Game+:** Exchange 50 U-Materials for a **Zemurian Ore Shard** at the General Store.

checkpoints.label: Scanned Icicle Penguin in Ymir Valley

blocks.content: 💡 The guest character with the highest Link EXP (Link Level 3) at the end of Act 1 grants their accessory for Chapter 2. Plan your hot spring choice and bonding accordingly.

blocks.name: Stranger than Fishin
blocks.content:
Accept Gerald's request at the Tavern, then leave town via **Ymir Valley** and continue to **Ymir Valley 2**. Find **Annabelle** at the center of the map and speak with her. Fish at the bridge—catching the target fish triggers a boss battle.

**Boss: Icy Croaker** — HP 68,100 | Weakness: Fire (160%), Strike (★★★☆)
Extremely vulnerable to **Faint** and **Sleep** status ailments. The boss only targets single characters, so there's minimal party-wide danger. Inflict status locks and burn it down with Fire arts.

Drops: **Effort** quartz, **Prankster** quartz (both helpful for cooking builds).

blocks.heading: Ending Act 1 - Part 3
blocks.content: Once all activities, quests, and bonding events are complete, **save your game** and return to your room to end the day. The game tallies your AP—you'll achieve **S-Rank** with 41 total AP. After the tally, the chapter's final boss fight triggers automatically.

blocks.name: Rufus
blocks.heading: Final Boss: Rufus (Unwinnable)

stats.Rufus: HP 128,640 | All elements at 90% | Unbalance: Strike only (★☆☆☆) | No drops

blocks.strategy:
This fight is **unwinnable** by design—Rufus will eventually use his S-Craft to wipe your entire party. However, the **bonus condition** for 3 AP requires reducing his HP **below 50% within 40 turns**.

Rufus has exceptionally high defense, making normal attacks nearly useless. Enhance your party with **Jusis's buffs** and spam **S-Crafts** for reliable damage. When CP is depleted, switch to Arts. **Critical warning:** If Rufus is allowed to cast his Arts, it deals **17,000 damage** to each party member—an instant party wipe. Keep a character with **Impede** crafts ready to cancel his casting at all times.

After dealing sufficient damage, Rufus uses his S-Craft to end the fight. A scripted (also unwinnable) mech battle follows, concluding Act 1.

blocks.heading: Aboard the Pantagruel
blocks.content:
After the opening event scene, you find yourself aboard the Pantagruel. Each room with a **red exclamation mark** contains a character to visit. Speak to everyone to advance the story:

- **Scarlet** — South Area, Southeast Room
- **Vulcan** — South Area, Northeast Room
- **Bleublanc** — Dining Table, Center
- **Xeno & Leonidas** — North Area, Southeast Room
- **McBurn** — North Area, Northeast Room
- **Duvalie** — North Area, Southwest Room
- **Altina** — North Area, Northwest Room

Visit all seven rooms to trigger the next story event.

checkpoints.label: Spoke to all characters on the Pantagruel

blocks.heading: Spirit Unification & Air Duct Escape
blocks.content: After speaking with everyone, head to the **second floor** and go north to the guest room. Knock on the door to trigger an event scene—**Rean** obtains the **Spirit Unification** ability. Once the scene concludes, head downstairs to your room in the **South Area, Southwest corner**. Examine the **air ducts** next to the flower vase to begin your escape. Proceed through the ducts to face a series of battles with only Rean and Alfin in your party.

blocks.name: Alliance Forces Soldiers
blocks.heading: Battle: Alliance Forces Soldiers

stats.Alliance Forces Soldier x2: HP 9,600 each | All elements 100% | All unbalance ★☆☆☆ | Drops: Teara Balm, EP Charge II

blocks.strategy: These soldiers deal significant damage and can heal themselves with arts. Use **Alfin's arts** to destroy them in roughly three hits. Cancel the soldiers' casting with **Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter** to prevent healing. Keep Rean's HP high at all times—use Alfin to heal if he drops low. The fight is manageable as long as you interrupt their arts consistently.

blocks.heading: Air Duct Treasures & Navigation
blocks.content:
As you work through the duct corridors, collect the following treasures before reaching the exit:

- **Celestial Balm** — West Room
- **Orange Cape** — East Room
- **Tearal Balm** — East Room

After clearing the ducts, you'll reach an area near the Orbment Charging Station. Use it to restore EP before the upcoming boss fight.

checkpoints.label: Collected all duct treasures and reached the exit

blocks.name: Duvalie & Bleublanc
blocks.heading: Boss: Duvalie & Bleublanc

stats.Duvalie: HP 85,316 | All elements 90% | Unbalance: Thrust ★☆☆☆, Strike ★☆☆☆
stats.Bleublanc: HP 96,640 | All elements 90% | Unbalance: Slash ★☆☆☆, Strike ★☆☆☆

blocks.strategy: Scan both bosses immediately for bestiary entries. The win condition is simple: reduce **either** boss to **50% HP** to end the fight. One well-placed **S-Craft** will deal nearly enough damage on its own—follow up with a few regular attacks to finish. Target whichever boss you prefer; Duvalie has slightly less HP making her the easier target.

blocks.name: Crow
blocks.heading: Final Boss: Crow (1-on-1)

stats.Crow: HP 96,640 | All elements 90% | Unbalance: Slash ★☆☆☆ only

blocks.strategy:
This is a solo duel between Rean and Crow. Exchange attacks normally and watch the turn order—if you see a **turn bonus** (Critical, etc.), use your **S-Craft** immediately to capitalize on the bonus damage.

**Critical Warning:** When Crow's HP drops below **50%**, he may unleash his S-Craft which can instantly kill Rean. Before pushing him past the threshold, ensure your HP is **above 7,000**. Heal preemptively if needed. As long as you survive his S-Craft, you can finish the fight with normal attacks afterward.

blocks.content: ⚠️ **Critical Opening Tip:** The guest character with the highest Link EXP (must be Level 3) will give you a powerful accessory during the opening sequence. This is determined by your choices in Act 1.

blocks.heading: Guest Character Accessories
rows: Attacks/Crafts can cancel arts (90% chance), Delay +6

blocks.content: 💡 **Resource Management:** From now on, spend mira and sepith only on the four characters you intend to bring to the Act boss. Swap equipment and quartz among support characters so they gain experience without extra expense. When the story requires specific characters, transfer their armor, boots, and quartz. Save as much mira and sepith as possible.

blocks.heading: December 15: Exploring the Courageous
blocks.content:
The **Courageous** airship is your new base of operations. Explore the ship and visit all locations marked with **red exclamation marks**. On the **1st Floor**, speak to **George** and **Valimar**—after this event, Rean can use **Spirit Unification** at the cost of 100 CP. Head to the **2nd Floor Cafeteria** and speak to **Millium** for a short scene. Play the **Blade Mini Game** in the leisure room; win or lose, the first 5 rounds each give 100 Link EXP. Visit **Princess Alfin** in the **Royal Room** on the 4th Floor.

After exploring, read the quest list at the computer terminal on the Bridge. **Gaius** is mandatory for your party. Speak to **Towa** to begin recruiting missing students. Destinations available: Ymir, Proving Ground, Garrelia Fortress, Nord Highlands, Legram.

checkpoints.label: Explored the Courageous and triggered all events

blocks.heading: Courageous Facilities Guide
blocks.content:
Not all facilities are available immediately—recruit Thors Academy students to unlock them.

**5F — Bridge:** Computer Terminal (quest hub, reporting, student intel) and Captain Towa (party management, destinations, story progression).
**4F — Assembly Area:** Royal Room (speak to Alfin for Phoenix Chapter medals based on achievements) and Training Facility (fight enemies for U-Materials and Master Quartz).
**3F — Shop Area:** Weapon/Item Shop (Casper), Accessory Shop (Colette), Premium Products (Hugo), Radio Sweepstakes (Munk, lottery system), Recipe Gift (offer recipes to Bridget for rewards).
**2F — Cafeteria:** Club activities (Fishing, Literature, etc.) and Blade Mini Game (Link EXP for first 5 rounds).
**1F — Engineering:** Synthesize quartz with George. Hangar for Orbal Bike customization (later: Clara unlocks EX-Orb function for Valimar).

blocks.heading: Proving Ground (Garrelia Camp)
blocks.content: Select **Proving Ground** from the world map (middle right). Bring **Laura** in your party. At the **Store Area**, speak to **Monica** to recruit her—she'll appear on the Courageous 3rd Floor afterward, where offering her Supreme Dishes earns item rewards (cook every Supreme Dish for a rare quartz). At the **Center of Camp**, speak to **Rex** to add his profile to the Notebook. Find **Officer Virginie** by the truck to learn the **Tomato Burger** recipe. Finally, head to the **Headquarters** (East Exit) and speak to **General Craig** to start the side quest.

checkpoints.label: Learned Tomato Burger recipe from Virginie

blocks.name: Without Leave
blocks.content:
Speak to General Craig at the Headquarters to accept. Gather info from NPCs marked with **green exclamation marks**: the lunch table (southeast corner), clerks in the resting area, and clerks in the store area. After gathering intel, speak to the soldier near the **west gate exit**, then head to **Garrelia Fortress - Ruins**.

At the ruins (no monsters—use the **Orbal Bike** with Square button), speak to soldiers near the tank on the west side (near Garrelia Byroad exit). Head to the east end near the **crater** to trigger an event and complete the quest.

**Treasure Chests in Area:** Adamant Shield (Garrelia Fortress), Sepith Mass x400, Crystal Flood.
**Trial Chest (Southwest Corner):** Defeat Huge Rat & Dirty Rats to unlock **Overdrive** for **Fie** and **Sara**. Strategy: Use full CP and S-Crafts, or exploit their poor magic defense with Sara's Arts.

**Post-Quest:** A **Cryptid** (giant monster) appears near the crater. Recommended Level 100 (possible at 75+ with setup). Defeating it drops a special quartz for **Lost Arts**. Best to attempt on NG+ when Jusis is Lv 81 (Platinum Shield) or wait until all 5 Cryptids are available in Ch 2-3.

blocks.heading: Garrelia Byroad: Emily & Nicolas
blocks.content: Exit east to **Garrelia Byroad 2**, then travel to **Garrelia Byroad 1**. Head to the **northeast corner** (Trial Chest location) to find **Emily** and **Nicolas**. Recruit them and help install the **relay machine**—there are 6 installation points total (3 on Byroad 1, 3 on Byroad 2). After placing all relays, report back to Emily and Nicolas, then return to the Courageous.

blocks.heading: Legram: Recruitment & Shopping
blocks.content: Return to the Courageous, speak to **Towa**, and set destination to **Legram** (bottom of map). At the **General Store**, buy **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4** and **Gambler Jack Reprint #8**. To recruit students: visit the **Chapel** (right room) and speak to **Vivi**—you need **Fie** in your party to convince her. At the **Training Hall** (left room), speak to **Casper**—you need **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4** to recruit him. Stop by the **Bracer Guild** for an event with Miles, then head to **Aprikoze Inn** to start the next side quest.

blocks.name: Badass in Danger!!!
blocks.content: Speak to the green-haired boy at Aprikoze Inn to start the quest. You need to find **Patiry** in **Ymir**—talk to **Luke**, the station guard by the pub, for his location. Return to the Courageous, travel to Ymir, and speak to Patiry near the station guard to complete the quest.

blocks.heading: Ymir Revisited
blocks.content: While in Ymir (Northern section of map), visit the **General Store** to buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #9** and learn the **Crunchy Rice Cracker** recipe. A new **Snowboard** course is available, and you can fish in Ymir Valley for additional catches.

blocks.heading: Zender Gate & Watchtower: Recruiting Mint
blocks.content:
Speak to Towa and set destination to **Zender Gate** (top right of map). Enter the gate and head north to find **Tank Officer Hoover**—he gives you **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8**. Leave Zender Gate and find **Beryl** at the stone monument in the **northwest corner**. If you miss Beryl here, she appears in Legram (Dec 19) or Terra Shrine (Dec 23).

Use Quick Navigation to travel to the **Watchtower**. Speak to **Mint** (choose the first option to help), then examine all key points marked with red exclamation marks on every floor. Head to the **rooftop** for an event—Mint joins the Courageous crew afterward.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8 from Hoover

blocks.name: Find Our First Years
blocks.content:
Recruit all four students to complete this quest:
- **Monica** — Garrelia Proving Ground (Store Area)
- **Vivi** — Legram Chapel (requires Fie in party)
- **Casper** — Legram Training Hall (requires Imperial Chronicle #4)
- **Mint** — Watchtower (rooftop event)

Once all four are recruited, return to the Courageous Bridge (5F), access the Computer Terminal, and select the 2nd option to report completion.

blocks.heading: Lake Lacrima: Shopping & Monster Madness
blocks.content: Speak to Towa and set destination to **Lake Lacrima**. At the **General Store**, buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #7**. Find **Sheeda** and speak to her to learn the **Hearty Milk Hotpot** recipe. Then visit the **Cabin** and speak to **Elder Ivan** or **Gwen** to trigger the Monster Madness story quest. Head to **Nord Highlands - North** and find the quest monster near the fishing spot in the northeast area.

checkpoints.label: Learned Hearty Milk Hotpot recipe from Sheeda

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.heading: Story Quest Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.strategy: Bring a full party for this fight. The Knight can heal itself, so you need to out-damage its recovery. When its HP gets low, spam **S-Crafts** immediately to finish it off before it can heal back up. Don't let the fight drag on—sustained burst damage is key. Reward: Sepith Mass x400, 2,500 Mira, 4 AP.

blocks.heading: Ancient Quarry Dungeon
blocks.content:
From **Nord Highlands - North**, use Quick Navigation to reach the **Ancient Quarry**. Grab the **EP Charge II** at the entrance. Speak to **Clara** (choose the first option) to begin exploring together.

At the **center path split**, find the Trial Chest—defeat **Alpha Diglem x2 & Diglem x4** to unlock **Overdrive** for Emma, Fie, Gaius, and Jusis. Continue to the **south end** (outside area) for the **Volcanic Rain** quartz. On the **north path**, a monster chest contains the **Pandora** Master Quartz. Collect **U-Materials** to the east. At the **north end**, the dungeon boss awaits.

blocks.name: Ginosha-Zanak
blocks.heading: Boss: Ginosha-Zanak (Ancient Quarry)

stats.Ginosha-Zanak: Giant Spider | Returning boss from CS1 (weakened) | Summons minions (max 4 at once)

blocks.strategy:
Status ailments are very effective—**Confused**, **Sleep**, and **Faint** all work well. Keep the minion count managed while focusing damage on the main body. With status locks applied, this fight is straightforward.

**Rewards:** Clara joins the Courageous. New features unlocked: **EX-Orb** function for Valimar and the **Awakener's Call** ability.
**New Game+ only:** Return to the boss area after the fight to find **Black Records #1**.

blocks.heading: Commencing the Operation
blocks.content: With all recruitment and dungeon content finished, return to the Courageous. Report status at the **Computer Terminal** on the Bridge (5F), then speak to **Towa** and select **"Commence Operation"** to advance to December 17th.
💡 **Nightmare Tip:** If you obtained Sharon's **Black Virtue** accessory, equip it on Rean permanently. Combined with Impede 1-2, it makes Arc Slash incredibly effective at canceling enemy arts.

blocks.heading: December 17: Twin Dragons Bridge
blocks.content: **Elliot** and **Sara** are mandatory party members for this segment. Choose your remaining slots carefully—there's no turning back after party selection. You immediately face a mech battle upon arriving.

blocks.name: Three Mechs (Spiegel, Hector, Drakkhen)
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Three Mechs

stats.Spiegel (Spear): Stays in backlines and buffs. Forced to front when others die. Weakness: Body

blocks.strategy: Focus on defeating one mech at a time rather than splitting damage. The Spiegel hangs in the backlines buffing the others—kill Hector or Drakkhen first to force it forward. Save Brave Points and CP for the second unit. Keep your HP above 35k-40k and heal proactively.

blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge Exploration
blocks.content:
After the mech battle, explore the bridge dungeon floor by floor.

**2F:** Right room has **EP Charge III**. From the center, take the west duct to find the **Flood** quartz (monster chest). Take the east path to a southwest duct for a **Curia Balm**, and continue east to the end for **Ebony Boots**. Head to the southeast corner to go upstairs.

**3F:** On the west side (via duct), check the second room for a **Tearal Balm**. In the southeast corner, break boxes to find the **Yggdrasil** quartz. At the center, the left treasure is an **Ebony Vest**. Take the right duct downstairs, then the east duct to return to 3F. North stairs lead to 4F.

**4F:** The north room has **Sepith x200**. Heal at the center point, then proceed to the boss.

blocks.name: Kaiser Doven B & Kaiser Doven R
blocks.heading: Boss: Kaiser Doven B & R
blocks.strategy: A straightforward fight. Use **Elliot's Resounding Beat** to keep the party healed. Wipe out summoned mobs immediately so they don't overwhelm you—once the adds are down, focus damage on the main bosses. With Elliot providing consistent healing, this shouldn't pose much threat.

blocks.heading: December 18: Celdic
blocks.content:
After clearing Twin Dragons Bridge, you arrive in **Celdic**. Head to the **Grand Market** and speak to **Gibson** (first shop, left side) to learn the **Comforting Cappuccino** recipe. Find **Cornette** (center) to buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #10**, and **Marco** (west end) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9**.

At the **West End House**, speak to **Becky** to recruit her (2 AP now, 1 AP later when she appears on the Courageous). Visit **Margot** at the Weathercock Inn and **Rosine** at the Chapel for free consumables.

Attend **bonding events** for Elliot, Emma, Jusis, Sara, and Towa to update their profiles. Character locations: Market Manager's House (Alfin), South End (Alisa), Grand Market (Elliot, Towa), West End (Emma, Jusis), Weathercock Inn (Fie, Laura, Sara), Weapon Shop (Machias), Chapel (Millium), Near Entrance (Gaius).

checkpoints.label: Learned Comforting Cappuccino recipe from Gibson
Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9 from Marco

blocks.heading: Ending Act 2 - Part 1
blocks.content: Once all activities, bonding events, and shopping are complete, take the **East Exit** of Celdic to end the day and trigger the AP tally. You need **36 total AP** for S-Rank.

blocks.heading: December 19: Preparation & Setup
blocks.content:
Read the quest list on the computer terminal to see your objectives. **Millium** is mandatory for this Act's party. If you recruited **Becky** previously, she now provides item exchange via the Pawnshop feature.

**Valimar Upgrade:** Sacrifice **1 Attack 2** quartz, **1 Action 2** quartz, and **20 U-Materials** to craft the corresponding Ex-Orbs for Valimar. This is strongly recommended for the tough mech battles ahead.

**Resource Management:** Continue spending Mira and Sepith only on your 4 main party members for the Act boss. Rotate support characters for EXP without upgrading their gear. Swap armor and quartz when the story forces specific characters.

blocks.heading: December 19: Courageous Activities
blocks.content:
Head to the **Front Deck (3F)** and speak to **Celine** (updates her profile). Talk to **Alfin** to receive the **Medal of Charity**. Play **Blade** with friends to raise Link EXP, then speak to **Millium** and **Jusis** for a short event.

Speak to **Towa** on the Bridge—the **Celdic** region is now added to Courageous destinations. Two new **Cryptids** are available: one in *Lunaria Nature Park* and one in *Nord Highlands - South*. You can defeat them now or later.

checkpoints.label: Received Medal of Charity from Alfin

blocks.heading: Ymir Visit (December 19)
blocks.content: Travel to **Ymir** via Towa. At the **General Store**, purchase the **Cheese Fondue** recipe book. The **Snowboard Mini-Game** has a new obstacle added—give it a try. Head to **The Phoenix Wings** inn and speak to receptionist **Baggins** to start the side quest.

blocks.name: Creeping for Creeps
blocks.content:
Play the snowboard mini-game and catch **two snow sheep** during the run. You can retry until successful—there's no penalty for failure. After catching them, a mini-boss fight triggers.

**Mini-Boss Tip:** The boss freezes your party and deals high single-target damage. Use S-Crafts immediately, or summon Valimar if the battle proves too difficult.
blocks.reward: 2 Bonus AP, 500 Sepith Mass, 3,500 Mira, 3 AP (Total 5-6 AP)

blocks.heading: December 20: Proving Ground & Twin Dragons Bridge
blocks.content:
Speak to **Towa** and select **Proving Ground**. Find **Munk** at the eating table (southeast area) and agree to help find his sticker. Return to the Courageous and equip Valimar with **Attack 1-2** and **Action 1** Ex-Orbs.

Set destination to **Twin Dragons Bridge**. Enter the **Command Room** (north door). Speak to **General Craig** to retrieve Munk's sticker, then talk to **Captain Gaul** (left side) to learn the **Seafood Salad** recipe. Speak to **Fiona** for a scene and **examine the bookshelf** to obtain **Hot Colour** for your Orbal Bike. Finally, speak to **Major Neithardt** (southwest, by the Panzer Soldat) to accept the mech duel quest.

checkpoints.label: Learned Seafood Salad recipe from Captain Gaul

blocks.name: I'll Make a Mech Out of You
blocks.content:
Defeat Major Neithardt in a mech duel. He hits extremely hard: 15k-17k damage in idle stance, 34k-37k in attack stance. Use **Morning Moon** to evade his strikes or keep a healer on standby. When his HP drops low, he enters a sword stance with a devastating 50k-60k attack—be ready to heal through it or reload and retry if you fail.

Also unlocks **Munk's Profile Page 1**.
blocks.reward: 2 Extra AP, Skill Handbook, 3,500 Mira, 3 AP (Total 5 AP)

blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge Loot & Trial Chest
blocks.content:
After the mech duel, explore the area for loot. In **Twin Dragons Bridge - Central Area**, find the **Flare Bomb** quartz. On the **Garrelia Side**, collect a **Yellow Pendulum** and **Sepith Mass**. A new monster, **Metal Beetle**, is available here after Dec 18—scan it.

Head to **Garrelia Byroad 1 (Under the Bridge)** and clear the **Trial Chest** to unlock **Overdrive** for Laura, Machias, Gaius, and Sara. The boss is **Giga Ashen Pom x2**—they're weak to area attacks, so use AoE crafts or arts.

blocks.name: Just Getting Wormed Up
blocks.content:
Head to **Garrelia Byroad 2** (southeast from Byroad 1). Find and defeat the monster in the **southwest corner**.

**Boss: Abyss Worm x6** — Use S-Crafts and summon Valimar to handle the large mob count efficiently.

blocks.heading: December 20: Recruitment Drive
blocks.content:
Return to the Courageous and speak to **Towa**, then travel to the **Proving Ground**. Return Munk's sticker—he joins the ship and unlocks the **Radio Sweepstakes** feature.

Head to the **Celdic Region** for more recruits:

**East Celdic Highway (Farm):** Meet **Paula** and help her find the black horse. Requires **Jusis** in your party. The horse is at **Lunaria Nature Park** (northwest corner, Park 2). Reward: Paula joins, unlocking **Horse Riding** on the field map.

**East Trista Highway (Southeast corner):** Find **Alan** and **Loggins**. Complete their scouting request. Reward: They join, unlocking the **Sword Training Facility**.

**North Kreuzen Highway 3 (Northeast):** Meet **Fidelio** and accept his request. Collect **Judgement Bolt** (behind Fidelio) and **EP Charge III** (west end).

blocks.heading: North Kreuzen Highway 3: Trial Chest & Dorothee
blocks.content:
In the **southwest area** of North Kreuzen Highway 3, find the **Trial Chest** for **Jusis** and **Millium**. The bosses are **Godlinoceros & Enduranoceros**—place your party in the back row, have Millium buff DEF with Ultimate Barrier while Jusis uses Fire Arts. Equip **Faint prevention** on Jusis.

Head to **East Celdic Highway 3** to find **Dorothee** (requires **Emma** in party). Defeat the black sheep nearby to complete Fidelio's request. Back on the Courageous, speak to **Dorothee** at the 2F Book Room to update her profile. Report status at the computer terminal, then speak to **Towa** (red option) to end the day.

checkpoints.label: Unlocked Overdrive for Jusis & Millium (Trial Chest)

blocks.content: ⚠️ **Party Lock:** On December 21, **Alisa** and **Rean** are mandatory and you cannot switch party members after selection. You can only access **two** of three Trial Chests available. Recommended: **Spina Byroad** (Alisa & Emma) and **Sachsen Mountain Path** (Eliot & Gaius).

blocks.heading: December 21: Spina Byroad
blocks.content: Check the fishing spot near the boat at the byroad entrance. Follow the linear path to the **Trial Chest**, which requires **Alisa** and **Emma** in your party. The boss is **Ghost Tomartian**—equip **Confuse resistance** and use an S-Craft immediately. Fire arts are also very effective. After the chest, collect the **Celestial Balm** and **Crescent Mirror** (west end). Head east to reach **Roer**.

checkpoints.label: Cleared Spina Byroad Trial Chest (Alisa & Emma)

blocks.heading: Roer Town Activities
blocks.content: Visit all key locations marked with red exclamation marks: **Hugo** (RF Store), **Linde** (General Goods), the **Cathedral**, **Instructor Mary** (Residence #1), and the **Airport**. Stop by **Dvance's Diner** for a scene. At the **General Store**, buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #11** and **#12**.

blocks.heading: Nortia Highway Exploration
blocks.content:
**Highway 1 (West Area):** Three chests containing **Tearal Balm**, **Athelas**, and Sepith.

**Highway 2:** Take the SE path for the **Aries** Master Quartz (monster chest). The north end has the **Nightmare** quartz, and the south has U-Materials. The center path has a **Trial Chest** requiring Eliot, Emma, Millium, and Sara—boss is **Pudgy Penguin x2**, weak to Fire and Confuse.

**Highway 3:** Collect **EP Charge III** (center), **EP Cut 2** (northwest), and **Phantom Phobia** quartz (north, near Ignis Shrine). Take the **SW exit** to reach **Schwarz Drache Barrier** for **2 bonus AP**—speak to **Margarita** there.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Aries Master Quartz (Highway 2 monster chest)

blocks.heading: Sachsen Mountain Path
blocks.content:
On the **north/northeast** area, find the **Suzaku** quartz (monster chest). Collect the **Celestial Balm** to the west and **Red Pendulum** to the south.

**Path 2 (Northwest Exit):** Pick up **Dragon Skin Boots** (west), **Cross Crusade** quartz (southwest), and **Tearal Balm** (northeast). The **Trial Chest** in the northwest requires **Eliot** and **Gaius**. Boss is **Master Cyron**—equip **Freeze resistance**. Have Gaius use his S-Craft on mobs and *Hunter Wing* on the boss while Eliot heals.

checkpoints.label: Cleared Sachsen Mountain Path Trial Chest (Eliot & Gaius)

blocks.heading: Iron Mines & RF Building Approach
blocks.content: Enter the **Iron Mines** and fight through **Jaegers**. Take the west exit (more Jaegers), then board the train and clear the fight rooms. Take the northwest exit to arrive at the **RF Building**.

blocks.heading: RF Building (Floors 5-23)
blocks.content:
**5F:** Collect **Celestial Balm** (SE room), **Sepith Mass** (west room), and **Dragon Skin Jumpsuit** (SE corner).

**12F (Elevator):** Find **Grim Butterfly** quartz (north), **EP Charge III** (left room), **Curia Balm** (center path, right room), and **Dark Pendulum** (SE room).

**20F (Elevator):** Grab **Sepith** (north), **Tearal Balm** (SW path), and **Black Bell** quartz (SE room). Examine the computer in the **SW room** to unlock the NW room, then collect the **Katze** Master Quartz from the newly opened room.

**23F (Elevator):** Use the heal point and save. The boss fight is next.

blocks.name: Regenenkopf Type-0
blocks.heading: Boss: Regenenkopf Type-0 (RF Building 23F)

stats.Regenenkopf Type-0: Has Shigure adds that heal/buff it | Weak to status downs | Heals + gains Insight at 25% HP

blocks.strategy:
**Preparation:** Equip Rean with a Canceller set and give Alisa **Confuse resistance** (True Gladiator Belt). Link Rean and Alisa together.

1. Defeat the **Shigure** adds first—they heal and buff the boss, making the fight unwinnable if left alive.
2. The boss is weak to status downs. Use AT Delay via Rean's *Arc Slash* combined with Alisa's *Heaven's Gift* to control its turns.
3. At **25% HP**, the boss fully heals and gains Insight. Immediately burst it down with S-Crafts before it can recover further.

**Post-Boss:** Save and change Ex-Orbs. **Critical:** Equip only **Attack 1-2** and **Action 1** Ex-Orbs on Valimar (important for Nightmare/NG+ runs).

blocks.name: Goliath
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Goliath

stats.Goliath: High damage mech with Gatling and Arm attacks

blocks.strategy: Watch the boss's attack patterns carefully. Use **Morning Moon** to evade Gatling and Arm attacks—timing your dodges is critical. Keep CP and EP high throughout the fight. Have **Sara** use **Thundering Roar** to debuff the boss, which makes the rest of the battle significantly easier.

blocks.heading: December 22: Bonding & Final Activities
blocks.content:
You have **5 Bonding Points** to spend. Prioritize **Alisa**, **Alfin** (pick up the **Dark Colour** from the shelf near her), **Laura**, or **Millium** to unlock Page 2 of their profiles (+500 Link EXP each). Visit **Instructor Mary** at Roer Residence #1 (2F, Southeast) to add Page 1 to her profile.

At the **Dining Bar (F)**, speak to **Grand** (orange hair) to learn the **Sweet Blue** recipe. Buy the latest **Imperial Chronicles** at the General Store. Speak to **Linde** or **Vivi** in the General Store area. At **Dvance Diner**, speak to **Logg** (counter) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 10**.

checkpoints.label: Learned Sweet Blue recipe from Grand
Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 10 from Logg

blocks.heading: Ending Act 2 - Part 2
blocks.content: Once all bonding events, shopping, and activities are complete, head to **Roer Airport**. Enter the **Courageous** (northeast corner) to end the day. The game tallies your AP for the chapter.

blocks.heading: AP Summary (Act 2 - Part 2)
rows: Quest: I'll Make a Mech Out of You
