blocks.heading: December 23: New Destinations
blocks.content: When you regain control, speak to **Towa** twice on the Bridge. New locations are added to the Courageous destinations, including **Eisengard Range** and the **Roer Region**.

blocks.heading: Courageous Activities (December 23)
blocks.content: On the **4th Floor (Training Facility)**, speak to **Emily** and **Alan** to update their character profiles. You can also speak to **Alfin** for a short event. Head to the **2nd Floor** and speak to **Dorothee** to purchase the **Pasta** recipe. On the **1st Floor**, speak to **Angelica** to update her profile. Play some **Blade** with friends to build Link EXP.
💡 The final two **Cryptids** are now available: one in **Nortia Highway 2** and one in **Eisengard Mountain 2**. If all 5 Cryptids are killed, speak to **Alfin** to receive the **Medal of Strength**.

blocks.name: The Sweetest of Challenges
blocks.content:
Examine the card on the desk in the Infirmary to start the quest. Class VII gathers in the meeting room—listen to everyone's opinions and repeat them back.

**Select the Culprit:** Choose **Machias** (2nd choice) to earn **2 extra AP**. Note: Picking Emma gives only 1 AP on the latest Japanese patch.
blocks.reward: Thief Cloak, 3,500 Mira, 3 AP (+2 if Machias chosen)

blocks.heading: Recruiting Hugo (Roer & Supply Chain)
blocks.content: Head to **Roer** and obtain any missing Trial Chests from the previous act. Go to the **RF Store** and speak to **Hugo** to accept his request. Leave Roer and travel to **Legram**—speak to **Watteau** at Watteau's Store. Then go to **Ymir's General Store** and speak to **Lio**. Visit the **snowboard area** (a new course has been added). Return to **Roer** and speak to **Hugo** again—he joins the Courageous and opens the **Premium Store**.

blocks.heading: Recruiting Stefan (Roer Institute)
blocks.content:
At the **Roer Institute of Technology** (Northwest Building 2F), speak to **Ratto** in the top corner and accept his request. Leave town via **Nortia Highway 2** and head to the **southwest corner** to find **Stefan**. You must have **Machias** in your party to trigger the event battle. After the battle, Stefan joins the Courageous.

*Optional:* The Cryptid **Agnagarn** is located on the southeast end of Nortia Highway 2. Recommended Level 100, but possible at 75+ with proper setup.

blocks.heading: Recruiting Kenneth (Nortia Highway 3)
blocks.content: Travel to **Nortia Highway 3** and head to the fishing spot (northwest of the map). Speak to **Kenneth** and accept his request. Catch a **Glutinous Bass** at the fishing spot beside him, then speak to Kenneth again—he joins the Courageous.

blocks.heading: Schwarz Drache Barrier Revisit
blocks.content:
Take the **southwest exit** of Nortia Highway 3 to reach the **Schwarz Drache Barrier**. Speak to **Rex** near the gate to update his bio and receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11**. Enter the resting area and speak to **Margarita** (requires **Millium** in party)—she joins the Courageous. Giving Margarita every **Peculiar Dish** rewards rare items and a rare quartz. Speak to the lady by the counter to learn the **Tomato Stew** recipe.

Return to the **Courageous Cafeteria** and speak to **Nicholas** to update his profile.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11 from Rex

blocks.name: Gone Air
blocks.content:
Set destination to **Eisengard Range** via Towa. An automatic fight with two Jaegers triggers. You arrive in the airship from the end of Chapter 1.

In the **northwest corner**, pick up the **Freeze Quartz** (if missed previously). In the **Lobby Room**, fight a group of Jaegers. In the **Northwest Room**, defeat a single Jaeger to get **Card Key 1**. On the **3rd Floor** (southeast entrance), defeat four Jaegers for **Card Key 2**. On the **4th Floor** (south entrance), defeat five Jaegers to finish.

**Klein** and **Hibelle** join the Courageous. Return and speak to **Klein** on the Bridge to update his profile.

*2nd Playthrough+:* Speak to **Norton** at **Roer's Airport** to receive **Black Records #4**.

blocks.heading: Eisengard Mountains: Trial Chest & Cryptid
blocks.content:
Revisit the **Eisengard Mountains** landing spot to find a **Trial Chest** requiring **Fie** and **Laura**. Clearing it unlocks their **Overdrive** function. The boss is **Rolling Rock** (HP 42,809)—weak to Faint, so use Laura's attacks to stun-lock it.

New enemies now appear in the area: Shadow Dancer, Venom Demon, and Steel Golem. The final Cryptid, **Lindbaum**, is located where you start a new game in this area.

checkpoints.label: Unlocked Overdrive for Fie & Laura (Trial Chest)

blocks.name: Kreuzen for a Bruisin'
blocks.content:
Return to the Courageous, speak to Towa, and set destination to **Celdic**. Travel to **East Celdic Highway 2**, then continue to **North Kreuzen Highway 3**. Find the quest monster at the **southwest end**.

**Boss: Abearddon** (HP 132,446) — A high-HP monster that hits hard. Use S-Crafts and exploit any status weaknesses.

blocks.heading: Shrine Trials Overview
blocks.content: You must now revisit all four Shrines for their trial areas. **Emma** must be in your party to access the new trial sections. Shrines are marked with red exclamation marks on the map. Clearing your first shrine triggers a story event; the remaining shrines can be completed afterward. Each shrine boss drops a **Zemurian Crystal**.

blocks.heading: Terra Shrine Trial
blocks.content:
At the entrance, speak to **Beryl** to update her profile. Use the warp device—Emma unlocks the gate. **Wall 1** requires hitting it with someone who has **Strike Proficiency B+** (Laura, Millium, or Machias) to create a bridge. **Wall 2** requires hitting it near an enemy to create a bridge.

**Treasures:** Earth Sepith, Ancient Glyph, Tear All Balm, **Genbu** quartz (monster chest), **Earth Bell** quartz.

**Trial Chests:** Alisa/Fie pair — Boss: Minos Lord + Minos Demons (weak to Faint). Machias/Millium pair — Boss: Dino Slug + Dissolution Slugs (weak to Faint).

Hit the final wall and cross to the boss room for the Magic Knight battle.

blocks.heading: Aria Shrine Trial
blocks.content:
Requires **Piercing Proficiency B+** (Alisa, Fie, Machias, or Sara) for the switches.

**Treasures:** Ragna Vortex, **Wind Bell** quartz, Celestial Balm EX, Wind Sepith, **Zeus Gem** (monster chest).

⚠️ **Do NOT leave without the Zeus Gem** — it is essential for the Final Dungeon.

**Trial Chests:** Fie/Millium pair — Boss: Clay Doll Omega (use Evasion Tank strategy). Jusis/Sara pair — Boss: Heavy Stalker + Stone Stalkers (equip Faint resistance, use Wind Arts).

Complete the bridge and reach the boss room.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Zeus Gem (Aria Shrine - DO NOT MISS)

blocks.heading: Aqua Shrine Trial
blocks.content:
Requires **Thrust Proficiency B+** (Fie, Gaius, Jusis, or Sara) to drain the water.

**Treasures:** Maelstrom, Yaksha, Curia Balm, **Water Bell** quartz, Water Sepith, **EP Charge IV**.

**Trial Chests:** Laura/Millium pair — Boss: Grand Ghastly + Gust Frogs (high STR S-Crafts are effective). Alisa/Machias pair — Boss: Gigantic Sharkodile (use Earth Pulse on Machias for HP regen).

Drain the water and reach the boss room.

blocks.heading: Ignis Shrine Trial
blocks.content:
Use **Rean's field attack** to extinguish flames and create bridges throughout the shrine.

**Treasures:** Fire Sepith, **Purgatorial Flame**, **Fire Bell** quartz, **Carnage** (monster chest).

**Trial Chests:** Alisa/Sara pair — Boss: Homuramikoto (use Impede to stop Flare Bomb; Water Arts effective). Machias/Emma pair — Boss: Arch Geist (use Impede to stop Grim Butterfly; equip Sleep/Nightmare resistance).

Extinguish the final flame and proceed to the boss room.

blocks.name: Magic Knight Dire Wolf
blocks.heading: Shrine Boss: Magic Knight Dire Wolf

stats.Magic Knight Dire Wolf: HP 156,170 | Skills: Ground Punch, Ground Smash, Boost (heals 23k HP + buffs all stats)

blocks.strategy:
The boss heals for 23,000 HP and buffs all stats with Boost, making prolonged fights dangerous. Focus on self-buffing your party or use strong arts—don't rely on slow attrition. Burst it down with S-Crafts when possible to outpace its healing. Avoid letting the fight drag on.

**Reward:** Zemurian Crystal (from whichever shrine you cleared first).

**Post-Boss:** Leave the shrine, return to the Courageous 1F, speak to **George**, and select the red option to advance the story.

blocks.heading: December 24-25: Celdic Operations
blocks.content:
**Jusis** and **Sara** are fixed party members for this segment. Survey key events in **Celdic** by visiting: the **Chapel** south room, **Otto** (Manager House 2F), and **Claire** (Army Guardhouse entrance). After all events, head to the **east exit of Celdic** for a cutscene.

Back on the Courageous, equip Valimar with your best Ex-Orbs. Speak to **Fidelio** (Computer Room 2F), **Loggins** (Sword Training 4F), and **Linde** (Bridge 5F) to update their profiles. Speak to **Towa** to start the operation.

blocks.name: Kestrel
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Kestrel
blocks.strategy: Plays similarly to the Spiegel mech from earlier. Save CP for counters or use **Seal** (Last CP ability) when it switches stances. Watch for stance changes and time your defensive abilities accordingly.

blocks.heading: Sara Solo & Aurochs Fort
blocks.content:
After the mech battle, fight a group of Jaegers with **Instructor Sara** alone. Use her **S-Craft** when CP is full to clear them quickly. Proceed to **Aurochs Fort** afterward.

**Aurochs Fort Navigation:**
- **1F:** North path → East → South room (**Curia Balm**). Southwest (**Cast 2**). Northeast room (**Celestial Balm EX**). Air duct → Southeast area (**Hellfire** quartz).
- **2F:** North path → Center gate → Air duct (**Chrono Burst** quartz). Southwest duct → Southeast corner (**Tearal** quartz). Northwest duct → North section (**HP 2** quartz).
- **3F:** North path → Northeast room (**U-Materials**).

blocks.name: Duvalie & Sleipnir x2
blocks.heading: Boss: Duvalie (Aurochs Fort)

stats.Duvalie: HP 203,010 | Uses Prism Calibur (10k-13k damage) below 60% HP
stats.Sleipnir x2: Support enemies that must be dealt with first

blocks.strategy: Kill the **Sleipnirs** first using S-Crafts—they buff and support Duvalie, making the fight much harder if left alive. Once Duvalie drops below **60% HP**, she begins using *Prism Calibur* for 10k-13k damage per hit. Counter this with **Platinum Shield** (Jusis) or Adamantine Shield to absorb the burst. Keep healing topped off and finish with S-Crafts.

blocks.heading: December 26: Bareahard
blocks.content:
At the **Alouette Inn** (Artisan Street), speak to **Giolamo** at the counter to learn the **Fruit Parfait** recipe. Speak to **Maicel** at the table to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12**.

At the **Duke's Mansion**, watch the event scene in the main hall, then the west room event. **Important:** Pick up **Windy Colour** from the drawer in **Jusis' room**—don't miss this.

checkpoints.label: Learned Fruit Parfait recipe from Giolamo
Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12 from Maicel
Picked up Windy Colour (Jusis' room drawer)

blocks.heading: Bonding Events (December 26)
blocks.content:
Attend bonding events for **Fie**, **Gaius**, **Machias**, and **Towa** to update their profiles. Attend **Alfin's** event specifically to unlock her final partner event on December 30.

⚠️ **Trophy Condition:** Attending all bonding events on this date is required for the "Bonding" trophy. **Save before choosing** in case you need to reload.

blocks.heading: Ending Act 2 - Part 3
blocks.content: Go to **Bareahard Airport** and enter the Courageous to end the day. Your total AP earned determines your rank—**S-Rank requires 38 AP**.

items.label: Recipe: **Spicy Curry** — Purchase from Dorothee (Courageous 2F Book Room)
Recipe: **Mixed Grill** — Speak to Josef at Arseid Mansion (Legram)
**Gambler Jack Reprint #13** — Fortnum Books, Christie's Galleria 2F (Bareahard)
**Gambler Jack Reprint #14** — Fortnum Books, Christie's Galleria 2F (Bareahard)
**Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13** — Speak to Spare at Aurochs Fort (Rest Area - Crescent Moon)
**Black Records #5** — Lohengrin Castle SW corner (2nd Playthrough only)
Quest: **Father's Pocket Watch** — Jackass' Repair Shop, Roer (Alisa required)

blocks.heading: New Character Profiles (December 27)
rows: Speak to Dorothee at Courageous 2F (Book Room)
Speak to Klein at Courageous 3F (Weapon Shop)
Speak to Munk at Courageous 3F (Resting Area)
Part of Hearts in Harmony quest line
Speak at Roer House #1 (2F SE) during Hearts in Harmony

blocks.heading: December 27: Courageous Exploration
blocks.content: When you regain control, explore the ship to update profiles. On the **3rd Floor**, speak to **Munk** and **Klein** to update their profiles, then talk to **Jusis** for a short event. On the **2nd Floor**, speak to **Dorothee** to update her profile and purchase the **Spicy Curry** recipe. Find **Kenneth** in the cafeteria, then talk to **Emma** or **Celine** for another event. On the **1st Floor**, speak to **Paula** and play the **Blade** mini-game to raise Link EXP. Finally, head to the Bridge, speak to **Towa**, and set destination to **Ymir**.

checkpoints.label: Updated profiles (Munk, Klein, Dorothee, Kenneth, Paula)
Purchased Spicy Curry recipe from Dorothee

blocks.heading: Nightmare Tips: Battle Preparation
blocks.content:
At the end of this Act, you fight two consecutive battles with different teams (including guest characters). Prepare accordingly:

**Weapons:** Craft 10 weapons for Class VII (Sara does not participate in the final battles).
**Quartz:** Assemble Attack Stacks (Attack 3) for high STR members: Rean, Laura, Gaius, Millium.
**Accessories:** Obtain 4 Warrior/Gladiator Badge accessories. Build a **Canceler Set** for Rean and a **Dodge Set** for Fie.
**ARCUS:** Ensure Rean, Laura, Fie, and Emma each have two Level 2 slots (one elemental, one non-elemental).

**Sepith & Levels:** Target 90,000+ Mira and ample Fire/Time Sepith. Convert excess Water/Earth Sepith (batches of 1000) to Mira. Fight every enemy in the 3 remaining shrines and complete all Trial Chests for grinding. **Target Level: 107-109** for fighters/tanks.

blocks.heading: Ymir: Beryl & Snowboarding
blocks.content:
In Ymir, complete the new **Snowboard** course to earn the **Passionate Rouge** accessory. For a critical recruitment: **manually enter Ymir Valley** (Quick Travel won't trigger the event). Walk all the way to the very end to find **Beryl**—speak to her to recruit her.

Back on the Courageous, speak to Beryl in the **Fortune Room** (2F, SE room) to check your relationship status and bonding trophy eligibility.

**Alisa Note:** If Alisa is active in boss fights, she permanently gains the **True Gladiator Belt** and links to Rean (switching to Fie if needed for other fights).

checkpoints.label: Recruited Beryl (walk to end of Ymir Valley manually)

blocks.heading: Legram: Josef & Side Quests
blocks.content: Travel to **Legram**. Head to the **Arseid Mansion** (northwest) and speak to **Josef** to learn the **Mixed Grill** recipe. Visit the **Bracer Guild** and speak to **Klaus** or **Miles** to start the available side quest.

checkpoints.label: Learned Mixed Grill recipe from Josef

blocks.name: Mist Opportunity
blocks.content:
**Emma** must be in your party. Travel to **Lohengrin Castle**.

**Treasures:** **Chakravarti Gem** (Entrance Hall, east side), **EP Charge IV** (opposite side of gem), **Dark Emblem** (Left Wing).

**Boss: Lucifuge** (HP 156,170)
- *Mechanic:* Summons Shadow Spirits. Defeat spirits to force the boss to waste turns re-summoning instead of attacking.
- *Soul Pinon:* Incapacitates a party member and drains their HP. Use an **S-Craft** to release them instantly.
- *Strategy:* Use S-Crafts to clear spirits quickly, then focus damage on Lucifuge.

*2nd Playthrough:* Find **Black Records #5** in the bottom-left corner of the castle.

blocks.heading: Bareahard: Recruitment & Shopping
blocks.content:
Travel to **Bareahard**. At **Fortnum Books** (Christie's Galleria 2F), purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #13** and **#14**. In the **Noble District** (House #2), speak to **Bridget** and call out **Alan** to recruit Bridget.

At **Sorciere Restaurant** (upstairs), speak to **Caroline** and accept her request—**Alisa** must be in your party. Go to Station Street, then the entrance of the Underground Waterway. Speak to **Theresia** and bring **Emily** to recruit her. This unlocks **Shooting Range Lv 4-5** (clear all 5 levels for the **Cypher** Master Quartz).

At **Turner's Jewelers** (Artisans' Street), speak to **Colette**. She asks you to find 4 **Dryad's Tear** on **South Kreuzen Highway** (marked with green exclamation points). Return them to recruit Colette.

**North Kreuzen Highway 2** is now accessible with a new fishing spot and a **Trial Chest** (Alisa/Elliot/Laura/Jusis). Bosses: King Falena x2 & Were Falena x4. Equip **Sleep resistant** accessory on Elliot (mobs use gas attacks). Use S-Crafts or Alisa's *Heavenly Gift* for the fight.

checkpoints.label: Cleared Shooting Range Lv 5 (Cypher Master Quartz)

blocks.heading: Aurochs Canyon & Fort
blocks.content:
Travel to **Aurochs Canyon** via Aurochs Fort. There's a fishing spot near the entrance. Collect treasures throughout: **Sepith**, **Celestial Balm EX**, **Qilin** quartz, **Impede 2** quartz, and **Shadow Blade**. In **Canyon 2**, find a **Trial Chest** for Machias/Jusis. The side quest monster is in Canyon 3 (see below).

At **Aurochs Fort**, speak to **Rex** and bring **Fidelio** to recruit him. In the **Rest Area - Crescent Moon**, speak to **Spare** to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13**.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13 from Spare

blocks.name: Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?
blocks.content:
Head to the **southeast corner** of Aurochs Canyon 3.

**Boss: Volkeron** (HP 146,640)
- **Formation:** Place Fie on top as bait.
- **Quartz:** Equip Freeze/Freeze II or Sleep on all members. Emma with strongest Water art.
- **Accessories:** Burn protection for all. Fie with Task equipment (AGI boost).
- **Links:** Pair Alisa and Fie.
- **Strategy:** Delay the boss constantly with Fie's *Bullet Cyclone* or Rean's *Arc Slash*. Focus damage with Water Arts. Freeze and Sleep are highly effective—keep the boss locked down.

blocks.name: Hearts in Harmony
blocks.content:
**Elliot** must be in your party. Recruit music-proficient NPCs:
- **Instructor Mary** — Roer House #1 (2F SE)
- **Fiona** — Garrelia Proving Ground (Store area)
- **Andre** — Bareahard Central Plaza (Street Musician)
- **Hibelle & Bridget** — Must already be recruited (no need to speak to them again)

Return to **Celdic Chapel** and speak to **Rosine** to complete.
blocks.reward: Zeram Powder, 4,500 Mira, 3 AP (+2 if all found)

blocks.name: Father's Pocket Watch
blocks.content:
**Alisa** must be in your party. Speak to 4 NPC groups:
1. **Harves & Gregor** — Entrance of Roer Institute of Technology (2F NW)
2. **Mine Chief Rudolf** — Outside Sachsen Iron Mines
3. **Miner Aman** — Inside Sachsen Iron Mines (Freight Station)
4. **Old Man Gwyn** — Lake Lacrima (by the truck)

Return to Jackass after speaking to all four.

blocks.heading: Shrine Trials Part B: Remaining Bosses
blocks.content:
Clear the remaining three shrine bosses:

**Shrine 2 — Magic Knight Heavy Ruby** (HP 199,127): Buff early. Use Rean's *Arc Slash* and Laura's *Radiant Wings* for setup. Main damage comes from Laura's **Earth Cleaver**. Spam S-Crafts when HP drops to 60-70k.

**Shrine 3 — Magic Knight Isla-Zeriel** (HP 210,210): Identical strategy to Heavy Ruby but with slightly higher stats. Same approach works.

blocks.name: Grianos-Aura
blocks.heading: Shrine 4 Boss: Grianos-Aura

stats.Grianos-Aura: HP 249,843 | Can inflict Freeze and Confuse

blocks.strategy:
**Preparation:** Emma with **Might Set** and Elemental Bell quartz. Rean with **Zeus Gem**. Equip Freeze/Confuse resistant accessories on everyone.

**Strategy:**
1. Overdrive Rean/Emma immediately.
2. Rean: Apply SPD buffs to the party.
3. Emma: Cast **Crescent Shell** and re-apply every turn, especially after boss attacks strip buffs. Use arts and S-Crafts for damage.
4. The boss's attacks can Freeze and Confuse your party—resistance accessories are non-negotiable here.

**Reward:** Zemurian Crystal.

blocks.heading: Post-Shrine: Final Preparations
blocks.content:
After clearing all four shrines, collect all **Zemurian Crystals** and craft **Attack Ex-Orbs** for Valimar. Make a **backup save** at the Courageous. Defeat any remaining **Cryptids** if you missed them earlier.

Speak to **George** at the Hangar and select the red option to advance the story. Note: the party is auto-boosted to **Lv 108** (Sara to Lv 111).

checkpoints.label: Advanced story via George (party boosted to Lv 108)

blocks.heading: December 30: Final Activities
blocks.content:
Play the **Blade** mini-game with a Class VII member (plus Sara) in the Leisure Room for **800 Link EXP**. Speak to **Monica** twice on 4F to update her profile and receive the **Kaiser Burger** recipe.

Visit **Alfin** on 4F for rewards based on your completion:
- If all profiles acquired: Receive **Phoenix Medal of Love**
- If all 3 Phoenix Medals acquired: Receive **Vermillion** Master Quartz
- *2nd Playthrough:* Receive **Deus Gem**

Speak to **Professor Schmitt** at the Hangar for a brief scene.

checkpoints.label: Received Vermillion Master Quartz (all 3 Phoenix Medals)

blocks.heading: The Final Operation: Team Selection
blocks.content:
Speak to **Towa** at the Bridge to begin. Select your teams carefully:

**Team A:** Mandatory **Towa**. Recommended: Alisa, Jusis or Emma.
**Team B:** Mandatory **Angelica**. Recommended: Laura, Fie, Machias.

**Divine Knight Battle:** Select your **Link Partner**. This choice affects the final bonding event trophy—pick the character you want for the ending.

checkpoints.label: Selected Team A and Team B for final operation

blocks.name: Goliath B & Kestrel B
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Goliath B & Kestrel B

stats.Goliath B: Slower mech, good for building CP

blocks.strategy: Target **Goliath B** first to build CP safely since it's slower. Heal whenever HP drops below 50%. Use **Morning Moon** when you reach 200 CP for a powerful evasive strike. Be careful with Kestrel B—it's the fastest mech and will counter-attack frequently, so save defensive abilities for it.

blocks.name: Team B: Thors Academy Students
blocks.heading: Team B Battle: Thors Academy

stats.Enemies: Vincent, Sariffa, Edel, Friedel | Sariffa heals the team

blocks.strategy:
**Laura:** Use *Brilliant Spin* to gather enemies, then *Brilliant Ember* to Mute Sariffa.
**Fie:** *Bullet Cyclone* for status ailments and AT Delay.
**Angelica:** Focus **Sariffa** first (she's the healer). Use *Zero Impact* for damage.
**Machias:** *Burst Drive* for AoE damage.

Apply status ailments (especially Seal) to lock them down. Use S-Crafts once enemies drop below 50% HP to finish.

blocks.name: Team A: Thors Academy Students
blocks.heading: Team A Battle: Thors Academy

stats.Enemies: Patrick, Celestin, Ferris, Lambert | Celestin heals, Ferris can Impede

blocks.strategy:
**Towa:** Use *A-Detector* to scan all enemies.
**Rean:** *Chrono Burst* first, then *Arc Slash* for AT Delay and art cancellation.
**Alisa:** *Heavenly Gift* for CP recovery and Insight.

Focus **Celestin** first since he heals the party. Cast arts before **Ferris** gets a turn—she can Impede your casting. Use S-Crafts to finish when HP is low.

blocks.heading: Ending Act 2 - Part 4
blocks.content: After both team battles conclude, the AP is tallied. You need **67 total AP** for an **S Rank**. This is cumulative across all of Act 2.

checkpoints.label: Achieved S-Rank (67 AP total for Act 2)

items.label: Recipe: **Tomato Pot** — Speak to Lotte near Upper Class Dorm entrance (Trista)
**Gambler Jack II - Finale** — School Library, speak to Librarian Karol
**Zemurian Ore** — Vice Principal Heinrich at Kirsche's (requires all GJ2 chapters)
**Fiery Colour** (Bike) — Bookshelf in house NE of Trista (bottom floor, right of staircase)
**Imperial Chronicle Issue #6** — Available at any book store
Quest: **Absentee Father** — Speak to Father Paulo at Trista's Chapel

blocks.heading: December 30 Night: Trista Exploration
blocks.content:
Once you regain control, there's a ton of side activities to do. Head to Trista near the entrance of the **Upper Class Dorm** and speak to **Lotte** to learn the **Tomato Pot** recipe. Return to Thors and enter the **School Library** to speak to Librarian **Karol** for **Gambler Jack II - Finale**.

If you've collected all chapters of Gambler Jack II, head to **Kirsche's Cafe & Inn** and speak to **Vice Principal Heinrich**—he gives you the **Zemurian Ore** (allows forging the strongest weapon) and updates his profile.

Two fishing spots are available in Trista: the pond at the north end of the school and the river northeast of town. Find the **Fiery Colour** bike book in the house northeast of Trista (bookshelf to the right of the staircase, bottom floor).

Speak to all NPCs on the profile list to update them. After speaking to everyone, visit **Alfin** at the principal's office for the **Medal of Love**. Take the **west exit of Trista** for an event, then speak to **Towa** at the school rooftop.

checkpoints.label: Received Medal of Love from Alfin

blocks.heading: Chosen Partner Event
blocks.content:
To see the yellow '!' event marker on the map, your chosen character must meet these conditions:
- Character's Link Level is 6 or higher
- You saw their Bonding Event in Bareahard at the end of Act 3
- Character has seen one of the 2 Key Bonding Events
- Link Level must be 5 or higher

**How to Choose:** Finish all side activities, then speak to the character and choose the **1st choice**. You can change your mind by talking to another character and choosing the 1st option. When ready, go back to **Class VII's dorm** and choose to enter.

**Rewards:** You receive the corresponding Trophy. If your partner reaches Link Level 7, you also get the **Link Master Trophy**.

blocks.heading: NPC Profiles (December 30 Night)
rows: Near entrance of Brandon General Goods
Near entrance of Kirsche's Cafe & Inn

blocks.heading: December 31: Morning Preparations
blocks.content:
Rean learns his **final S-Craft** at the start of the day. Head to the 1st floor and speak to **George** to use the Zemurian Ore and craft the strongest weapon.

Purchase **Imperial Chronicle Issue #6** from any book store. Speak to **Zirbel** at Trista's Chapel for the Absentee Father quest (see below).

**Cooking Rewards:**
- Give all 22 superb dishes to **Monica** (2nd floor Cafeteria) → **Impenetrable Shield** quartz
- Give all peculiar dishes to **Margarita** (northern end of corridor) → **Chaos** quartz
- Give all 22 recipes to **Ferris** (Game Room) → **Genesis** Master Quartz
- Give every type of unique dish to **Bridget** (3rd floor) → **Revolution** quartz

**Black Records (2nd Playthrough):** Speak to **Instructor Thomas** (Book Room, 2F) with all Black Records for a trophy. Missing one? Check **Micht** in Trista or **Becky** (3rd floor of Courageous)—leaving and re-entering Micht's store refreshes his stock.

checkpoints.label: Crafted strongest weapon with Zemurian Ore
Collected all cooking rewards (Monica, Margarita, Ferris, Bridget)

blocks.heading: Optional Dungeon: Glacia Shrine
blocks.content: Head to Ymir and speak to Rean's father at the **Baron's Mansion** to unlock the shrine. Travel to the very west end of **Ymir Valley 1** to enter. Completing it earns the **Ice Crown** accessory (10 CP Regeneration/turn, +50% Critical Up) and **The Frost Hunter** trophy.

blocks.heading: Additional December 31 Activities
blocks.content:
**Emblem Master Quartz:** Speak to **Towa** after recruiting all students.

**Fishing:** Catch 23 fish types, then speak to **Annabelle** (Ymir Valley) to unlock the **Arch Tyrant**. Catching it allows purchase of the **Aeolus Gem**.

**Snowboarding:** Clear the new course for the **Skanda Gem**.

**Kenneth:** Speak to him at the Courageous Cafeteria for the **Orochi** Master Quartz (if you caught Arch Tyrant) and **Sennin Gem**.

**East Trista Highway:** Explore for new monsters (Battle Notes) and treasure—find the **Altair Cannon** on Highway 2 and **Hades Gem** on Highway 1.

**Battle Notes:** Speak to **Stefan** (Computer Room, 2F) with 284 notes for the **Calamity** Master Quartz. Missing Metal Beetle? Check Twin Dragon Bridge (Garrelia Side) after Dec 18.

**Optional Scenes:** Visit Scarlet (Albarea Mansion), Proving Ground resting area, Professor Schmitt (Kirsche).

checkpoints.label: Turned in 284 Battle Notes to Stefan (Calamity MQ)

blocks.name: My Jormungand Don't Want None
blocks.content:
**Location:** End of East Celdic Highway 3 (northeast end).

**Boss: Jormungand** (HP 172,254)
- **Weakness:** Faint effects work well
- **Strategy:** Canceler build recommended

**Reward Shard:** Counts toward Zemurian Ore Shard collection.

blocks.name: Sachsen Violence
blocks.content:
**Location:** Sachsen Iron Mines → Sachsen Mountain Path 2 (northeast near fishing spot).

**Boss: Gespard** (HP 178,653)
- **Weakness:** High physical defense—use Arts
- **Strategy:** Impede is effective for AT manipulation

**Reward Shard:** Counts toward Zemurian Ore Shard collection.

blocks.name: Nord by Nord-east
blocks.content:
**Location:** Nord Highlands - Northeast (center area).

**Boss: Glider Quaker** (HP 139,380)
- **Weakness:** Weak to Mute (silences Thunder Wave)
- **Strategy:** Low HP boss—S-Crafts work well for a quick kill

**Reward Shard:** Counts toward Zemurian Ore Shard collection.

blocks.name: Ymir, Far, Wherever You Are
blocks.content:
**Location:** Ymir Valley - End (left side).

**Boss: Sasquatch** (HP 183,654)
- **Weakness:** Confuse status is effective
- **Strategy:** Canceler strategy works well here

**Reward Shard:** Counts toward Zemurian Ore Shard collection.

blocks.name: Absentee Father
blocks.content:
Speak to head priests in major towns in this order (bring Sara/Gaius for scene changes):
1. **Celdic Chapel** — Zirbel
2. **Bareahard Cathedral** — Amon
3. **Legram Chapel** — Hamilcar
4. **Roer Cathedral** — Homs
5. **Ymir Chapel** — Bernard

After visiting all five, use the Courageous computer to submit the report.
blocks.reward: Lion Heart accessory, Gold Trophy (315 AP), Acala Gem, 4,500 Mira, 4 AP

blocks.heading: Final Mission Preparations
blocks.content: Before starting the final mission, cook **15+ Tomato Hotpots** (Seasonal Hotpot) and **20-30 Speed-boosting foods**. When ready, speak to Towa to commence the operation. Select your party—**Machias** is mandatory.

checkpoints.label: Started final mission (party selected with Machias)

blocks.heading: Karel Imperial Villa: Dungeon Walkthrough
blocks.content:
At the **Entrance**, fight Alliance Forces. Inside the villa interior, defeat soldiers and heal at the Orbment Station.

**Treasures:** North Chest has **Claiomh Solarion**, South Chest has **Seraphic Ring**. Outside (North Exit) find U-Materials, Tear All Balm, and a monster chest with the **Goldia Key**.

**Villa 3:** Enter from the south, use the Goldia Key, and fight more soldiers. For high-DEF enemies, use Laura (Warrior Set + Zemurian Ore Weapon). For magic damage, use Emma/Elliot with Aries MQ + Shadow Blade.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Goldia Key (monster chest outside villa)

blocks.name: Altina & G-Zephyranthes
blocks.heading: Boss: Altina & G-Zephyranthes

stats.Altina: Uses Black Barrier (reflects physical) and Brionac (laser)

blocks.strategy:
Kill **G-Zephyranthes** first since it has high DEF—use Arts and S-Crafts for damage. Altina reflects physical attacks with Black Barrier, so use Crescent Mirror/Shell to reflect her Brionac laser back at her.

**Reward:** If you have all Medals from Alfin, you receive the **Grand Cordon** accessory (+100 STR/DEF/ATS/ADF, +10% Crit).

blocks.name: Divine Knight Ordine
blocks.heading: Final Mech Battle: Divine Knight Ordine
blocks.strategy:
**Attack Patterns:** Starts with Normal (Arm) → Charge 1 (Body) → Charge 2 (Head) → repeats. After 50-60% HP, adds Charge 3 (Arm) and Charge 4 (Head).

*Note:* Charge 2 and Charge 4 share the same quote ("Prepare yourself!")—you must distinguish by position in the pattern.

**Strategy:** Build CP for **Morning Moon** to counter attacks based on the unbalance weakness. If Head is the weakness, use Morning Moon or Guard. For Charge 3 (Arm weakness), use Morning Moon for 2 hits to dodge his deadliest attacks.

**Follow-Ups:** 4 consecutive unbalances triggers a Follow-Up. 5 consecutive (second half of fight) triggers a stronger one.

**Support:** Elliot for healing, Alisa for CP regen, Sara for Strength Down debuff.

blocks.name: Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 1
blocks.heading: Vermillion Apocalypse (Phase 1)
blocks.strategy:
**Party:** Elliot, Fie, Gaius, Machias, Sara.

**Preparation:** AoE Arts (Shadow Blade, Altair Cannon, Claiomh Solarion). Chrono Burst on someone other than Rean. Seraphic Ring on 2 characters. One weak art for dispelling barriers. Elliot with Aries MQ. Accessories cover Faint, Death, Confusion. Gladiator Headbands on Sara and Gaius.

**Baiting (Safest):** Fie attacks immediately to draw aggro while party buffs. Sara/Gaius use Thunder Roar and Gale Storm (avoid Flash EX and Savage Fang II to maintain formation). Elliot/Machias heal, buff, and use Burst Drive. Use Impassion on Fie.

**S-Craft Spam:** Fie uses Bullet Cyclone II every turn. Gaius buffs, uses Twin Cyclones, then Wild Rage. Feed Seasonal Hotpots for CP recovery.

**Cancelling:** Regroup whole party next to boss. Spam Chrono Drive/Break with Elliot. Bullet Cyclone II and Arc Slash for AT Delay. Keep HP topped with Holy Song or Seraphic Ring. When HP reaches 60,000, spam S-Crafts.

blocks.name: Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 2
blocks.heading: Vermillion Apocalypse (Phase 2)
blocks.strategy:
**Party:** Use the reserve team (members not used in Phase 1).

**S-Craft (Recommended):** Use Platinum Shield or Adamantine Shield to mitigate the 15,000+ HP all-hitting attack. Speed boost ASAP. Combo Spirit Unification + Radiant Lion repeatedly. Recharge CP with Seasonal Hotpot. Goal: 6-7 combos to reach the HP mark.

**Cancelling:** Only attempt if Rean is Lv 130 and fully equipped to prevent the boss from acting. Alternative: Use Rean's extra turns for Shields, Mirrors, and debuffs. Rush the boss with Rean and Laura at 3 Bravery Points—abuse Radiant Lion.

**Caution:** This phase hits harder and summons mobs. Ensure Alisa has Insight.

blocks.name: Vermillion Apocalypse Phase 3
blocks.heading: Vermillion Apocalypse (Phase 3 - Mech)
blocks.strategy:
You team up with **Ordine** for this mech battle. No support items or arts available—Defense is your only mitigation.

**Key Rule:** Keep Ordine alive! If he falls, you lose crucial damage.

**Pattern:** Normal (Arm) → Charge 1 (Body) → Charge 2 (Head) → Repeat.

**Execution:** Use offensive crafts to build Bravery Points quickly, then unleash Burst attacks. **Caution:** At 50% HP, the boss can Rush/Burst your party if comboed, which can kill Ordine due to his lower defense. Establish a rhythm and attack the correct weak points to finish quickly.

blocks.heading: Ending
blocks.content: After defeating the final phase of the Vermillion Apocalypse, watch the ending credits and **save your game**. This save data carries forward to Trails of Cold Steel III.

checkpoints.label: Completed the Finale and saved clear data

blocks.content: **Important:** For this chapter, you play as **Lloyd** and **Rixia** from the Crossbell arc. You only have two party members, there are no shops, and bosses are very hard. Leveling up and farming quartz/sepith is crucial.

blocks.heading: Preparation: Quartz Farming Strategy
blocks.content:
Recommended quartz to farm throughout the dungeon: **Defense 3** (easiest to obtain—you'll likely have many by the end), **Hit 2**, **Water Quartz**, **Impede 1-2**, **Action 3**, **HP 2**, and **Attack 3**. Gathering quartz is the major challenge of this chapter, so fight every encounter you can.

**Farming Method:** Exploit Lloyd's S-Craft **Raging Sun** for efficient clears. During Sepith-Up bonus turns, **do NOT skip the animation**—this farms sepith significantly faster. Don't worry about CP management since Lloyd has both a **Lv 5 Force MQ** and a **True Gladiator Belt** equipped, giving him near-infinite CP generation. Use this to spam Raging Sun repeatedly for fast grinding.

blocks.heading: Section 1: Navigation
blocks.content:
Start by going to the room to the **north** and examine the computer terminal to receive the **Crossbell Times**. Head **west** down the hallway where you encounter a slime mini-boss (small chance to drop useful quartz).

Run to the middle, then go all the way to the **south end**. In the southwest corner, grab the **Celestial Balm EX**. Go back up and take the **east path**—at the end, enter the air duct to find an **EP Charge IV**.

Go downstairs where you find two switches (north and south ends). Climb down the ladder to the left of the north switch and clear the monster chest for the **Grail Locket**. Return upstairs and flip the **north switch** (moves the ladder to the top), then flip the **south switch** to lower the bridge on the south end.

Return upstairs via the northwest ladder, go all the way south to the southeast side. Climb down and take the **west air duct** for the **Seven Dragon Armor**. Return and take the **north air ducts**—once out, grab the **Bakuya** sword (northwest corner). Go to the middle, enter another air duct to find a switch that creates a bridge. Take the **west exit** to Section 2.

blocks.heading: Section 1 Treasures
rows: Inside air duct on east path
Inside west air duct (after lowering south bridge)

blocks.heading: Section 2: Navigation
blocks.content:
Head to the south area—in the southeast corner, grab an **EP Charge IV**. Go back north and west on top of the air ducts. Take the southeast path for a **Strega S**. Go to the southwest end and flip the switch to lower the center south bridge.

Go downstairs heading north, then walk over the east air duct for the **Emergency Muppet**. Follow the northwest path downstairs and keep going straight to the southeast room. Fight the **mosquito mini-boss**—defeat it and flip the switch near you to shift the platform north. Grab the **Celestial Balm EX** treasure to the northwest.

Climb the south ladder, go past the bridge, and cross the southeast air duct. Head upstairs and flip the **south switch** to lower the bridge. Return to the previous area to find a **Zeus Gem** in a monster chest. Flip the same switch again, go upstairs, and flip the **southeast switch** to access the west end.

Fight a **jellyfish mini-boss** immediately upon arrival. Head downstairs, go all the way down in the center to find a switch—flip it to access the west end leading to Section 3.

> **Tip:** If you need to heal between sections, use the orbment station on the west end of the current map.

blocks.heading: Section 2 Treasures
rows: Southeast path (after going west on air ducts)
Monster chest (after lowering bridge via southeast switch)

blocks.heading: Section 3: South Section
blocks.content:
The elevator in the starting area requires pressing switches at both the north and south ends to activate.

For the south section: go all the way to the southeast corner and climb the ladder. Travel north over the air ducts to find the **Pentagon** weapon. Return to the previous area, go west, and flip the switch to shift platforms. Go southeast through the air ducts.

Go to the west side, climb the ladder, and cross air ducts to find a monster chest—clear it for a **Zeram Capsule**. Go back down, head to the east end, and flip the switch. On the south end, find the **Seishin Robe** and **Tear All Balm**. Activate the bottom switch to release one elevator lock. Use the east switch to shift platforms again, then return to the starting area.

checkpoints.label: Found Pentagon weapon (north end via air ducts)

blocks.heading: Section 3: North Section
blocks.content:
Head downstairs and go to the northwest path for a **Celestial Balm EX**. Enter the nearby air ducts leading to the upper area. Follow the path south to the southeast end for a **Strega P**.

Go north to find an air duct leading to the northeast area. You'll find two switches: activate the one on the **right** to release the last elevator lock, then press the switch on the **north** to get down to the first floor.

Return to the starting area, **ride the elevator down**, heal at the orbment station, and take the **east exit** to the boss room.

blocks.heading: Section 3 Treasures
rows: North end (via SE corner and air ducts)
Monster chest (west side via air ducts)

blocks.name: Rean & Altina (Geofront Boss)
blocks.heading: Boss: Rean & Altina
blocks.strategy:
**Formation:** For tanking, place Lloyd at Top and Rixia on a Back row corner. For cancelling, both need to be on the Front row.

**Quartz:** Use everything you farmed. Give Rixia the **Last Resort Muppet** (she's fastest). Link Lloyd-Rixia.

**Strategy 1 — Cancelling:** Use Lloyd's **Burning Heart II**, then **Raging Spin** to pull both bosses away from Rixia. When Lloyd has only one buff turn left, re-cast Burning Heart II to prevent the Faint side-effect. Rixia uses **True Falling Moon** to hit both bosses—Freeze procs grant breathing room. **Kill Rean first** (most dangerous). Altina's Black Barrier takes 2 hits to dispel.

**Strategy 2 — Tanking:** Burning Heart II + Raging Spin immediately to push Rean/Altina far from Rixia. Alternate Raging Spin with Brave Smash II to keep them separated and potentially Seal Rean. Rixia spams **Crystal Flood** for Freeze procs. Keep HP near full—both bosses can use S-Crafts without warning.

**Final Tips:** With Zeus Gem and Impede 2 equipped, AT Delay works wonders. When HP reaches 70,000 or lower, spam S-Crafts to finish them off. This fight is very dependent on your quartz preparation.

blocks.heading: March 12: School Exploration
blocks.content:
Once you regain control, explore the school and speak to students to update their character notes. Start at the **Music Room** (Main Building 2F South) to find **Bridget**, **Hibelle**, and **Mint**. Visit **Nicolas** at the Home Economics Room (Southeast), **Clara** at the Art Room (East), and **Vice Principal Heinrich** at the first floor east hallway.

Speak to **Principal Vandyck** at the principal's office (Main 1F East) for a short event. Head to the school rooftop for **Instructor Makarov** and **Vincent**. At the academy field, talk to **Jusis**, **Paula**, and **Lambert**. In the Gymnasium, speak to **Friedel** and **Alan**.

Go to the **Engineering Building** for a story event, then head to the rear exit to the Hangar and talk to **Valimar**. At the **Student Union Building**, purchase the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #7** from the store (if you have every book, you get the **Book Maniac** trophy). Talk to **Ferris** and **Theresia** for bio updates. Head upstairs to speak to **Fiedelio** at the Photography Club. Finally, go to the **Student Council Room** to continue the main story.

> **2nd Playthrough:** Go to the Instructor Room (Southeast) and speak to Instructor Thomas for the **Decoding Report** (requires all five Black Records books).

blocks.heading: March 12: Class VII Dorm
blocks.content:
After the Student Council scene, you end up at the **Class VII Dorm**. Speak to everyone to update their profiles. When you've spoken to all residents, head back to your room to end the day.

> **2nd Playthrough:** If you received the Decoding Report, open it in your inventory and read all the Black Records.

blocks.heading: March 13: Free Day Overview
blocks.content:
Read the task assignments. Unlike the original game, you must report to **Towa** to claim the reward from each quest you finish. Before doing task assignments, update profiles by speaking to:
- **Sariffa** at the park and **Edel** near the Gardening shop
- **Lotte** near the Upper Class Dorm
- **Munk** by the Lower Class Dorm entrance and **Klein** inside the dorm
- **Hugo** at Thors Auditorium building
- **Linde** at the garden (north end of Thors)
- **Loggins** at Student Union Building 1F, **Stefan** at the Chess Club (2F), and **Beryl** at the Occult Research Club (2F)

Afterwards, work on the task assignment quests. All missing books (Gambler Jack Reprint, Imperial Chronicles) can be purchased from **Keynes Bookstore**. **Micht's Pawnshop** has a chance of selling Gambler Jack II volumes.

items.label: Quest: **Swimming Lessons: The Return** — Only appears after finishing 3 quests (Junk Wanted, Let's Talk Trista, Angler Management)
All missing books available at **Keynes Bookstore** and **Micht's Pawnshop** (Gambler Jack II random stock)
Report all completed quests to **Towa** before progressing story

blocks.name: Junk Wanted
blocks.content:
Accept Brandon's request at the general store. Follow this sequence to collect all the junk items:
1. Speak to **Micht** at the Pawn shop
2. Head to **Sara's room** at the Class VII dorm
3. Go to **Kirsche's Cafe & Inn** and speak to **Sara** (you'll end up with the Carnelia books as part of her collection of junk)
4. Go to Thors, speak to **Janitor Gyler** at the main building entrance
5. Go inside and speak to **Clara** at the art room (2F east)
6. Go to the Academy Field and speak to **Lambert**
7. Return to the Pawn shop and speak to **Micht** again
8. Speak to **Brandon** at the general store to turn in all items and complete the quest

blocks.name: Let's Talk Trista
blocks.content:
Head to **Radio Trista** (southwest of Trista) and accept Michael's request. Speak to the following NPCs in any order for bonus AP:
1. **Kirsche's Cafe & Inn** — Old Man Abbot
2. **General Store** — Tyzel near the entrance
3. **Upper Class Dorm** — Lotte
4. **Thors Main Building Faculty Lounge** — Vice Principal Heinrich
5. **Gymnasium** — Monica at the training hall
6. Return to **Radio Trista** and read the letter on the table to complete the quest
blocks.reward: Celestial Balm EX x3, 3,000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

blocks.name: Angler Management
blocks.content: Accept Kenneth's request at Trista's River (northeast of town). Play the fishing mini-game until you catch a **Noble Carp**—an event will occur when you do. Then use **Kenneth** to catch the **Giant Swordtail** to finish the quest. This unlocks Kenneth's profile update.

blocks.name: Swimming Lessons: The Return
blocks.content:
**Unlocks after finishing the three quests above.** Neithardt will call you—go to the Faculty Lounge.

Participate in the swimming mini-game. Choose two opponents (one boy, one girl from Class VII)—this choice increases Link EXP with them, so pick characters you still need levels with.

**Mechanic:** Press button prompts when rings are highlighted to increase swimming speed (same as the first Cold Steel game). Beating your opponent earns an extra 1 AP.
blocks.reward: Zeram Capsule, 300 Link EXP, 3,000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

blocks.name: The Race to End All Races
blocks.content:
Speak to **Angelica** or **George** at the Engineering Building to begin. You'll be challenged to a motorcycle race against Angelica.

**Winning Strategy:** Hold down the accelerate button, get ahead early, and physically block Angelica by positioning your bike in her path. Maintain the lead throughout. Defeating her earns **1 bonus AP**. If you lose, you can rematch—there's no penalty for retrying.

**Important:** Winning grants the **Engineering Building Key**, which unlocks additional areas.
blocks.reward: Lightning Belt, EP Charge IV x3, Engineering Building Key, 3,000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

blocks.name: Class Warfare
blocks.content:
Talk to **Patrick** at the Academy Field for a series of escalating battles. This is a required quest.

**Battle 1 — Patrick & Celestin (2v2):** Inflict Delay and status ailments. Both are weak to status effects. When HP is critical, Celestin may cast Seraphic Ring to heal. Using S-Crafts here grants 100 CP for the next battle, so save them for the finish.

**Battle 2 — Vincent, Ferris, & Sariffa (3v3):** Focus **Sariffa** first—she freezes/petrifies and has high evasion. Then take out Vincent. Ferris supports with Crescent Mirror but is less threatening. Status ailments work well on all three.

**Battle 3 — Vandyck & Beatrice:** Save S-Crafts and Overdrive for this fight. They are immune to status ailments, but **AT Delay** works. Vandyck is the main attacker with extremely high damage; Beatrice heals. Use AT Delay to stop Vandyck from getting turns. If hit, heal immediately with Seraphic Ring.

> Note: If playing the Japanese 1.00 version, update the game to avoid crashes when speaking to Patrick.
blocks.reward: Albion Garb, Tear All Balm x3, Link EXP +200, 3,000 Mira, 1 + (1) AP

blocks.heading: Post-Quests: Story Progression
blocks.content: After the story quest, move to a random location for an event scene, then go to the **Old School House** to continue the main story.

blocks.heading: Final Dungeon Preparation
blocks.content:
Before exploring the final dungeon, complete the following for character bio updates. Speak to **Elise** first (updates bio). Talk to **Claire** and **Alfin** for a short scene. Then leave the final dungeon to visit NPCs:
- **Makarov** at Main Building 1F Faculty Lounge
- **Margarita** at Home Economics Room (Southeast)
- **Becky** and **Colette** at the Auditorium (Southwest of Thors)
- **Dorothee** (Literature Club) and **Rex** (Photography Club) at Student Union Building 2F
- **Casper** at Gymnasium Pool
- **Lotte** near Upper Class Dorm entrance (Trista)
- **Celestin** inside Upper Class Dorm

blocks.heading: Character Profiles (Final Prep)
rows: Speak to Elise at the Reverie Corridor

blocks.name: To Sharon, With Love
blocks.content:
**WARNING:** Sharon must NOT be in your party when starting this quest.

Accept the request from Anton near Trista Station.
1. Talk to an NPC with a green exclamation mark (**Micht** at Pawn Shop or **Becky** at Auditorium)
2. Choose the second option: "Let's think of another idea"
3. Talk to the other highlighted NPC
   - If **Micht**: Choose "Brace for the Bracelet"
   - If **Becky**: Choose "Recommend the stone"

**⚠️ WARNING:** Do NOT speak to **Jane** by the Gardening Shop, or you will fail the quest and only get 1 AP.

blocks.heading: Reverie Corridor: Overview
blocks.content:
The **Reverie Corridor** is the true final dungeon, accessed through the Old School House. It offers unique features found nowhere else in the game: access to all 18 regular party members plus 5 Special Characters, **3x Link EXP** after fights (excellent for closing gaps), regenerating treasure chests that reset on re-entry, and Valimar availability for all boss fights. Four Zemurian Ore Shards can be earned from the four sector bosses, allowing you to craft another Ultimate Weapon.

The dungeon consists of **four sectors** themed around elements (Yellow/Earth, Red/Fire, Blue/Water, Green/Wind). Enemies have resistances and weaknesses matching their sector's element. The layout is **semi-random**—the order and arrangement changes every time you leave and re-enter the Old School House. Enemy types depend on sector order (e.g., a Fire sector before an Earth sector spawns unique enemies).

Sector 1 has small, stunnable enemies. By Sector 4, 90% are "Tough" enemies that cannot be stunned—difficulty increases steadily. Chest contents regenerate on re-entry: Brown chests give Sepith, Monster Ingredients, and high-level curatives (Zeram Powders/Capsules). Red chests give accessories and Lv 3 Quartz. Monster chests give special quartz (Dragon Vision, Genbu, Suzaku, Gem and Bell types). Loot quality improves noticeably in Sectors 3 and 4.

**Cryptids** are fought at the end of every 4th floor. The **True Final Boss** awaits on the **17th floor**.

checkpoints.label: Defeated all 4 sector bosses (4 Zemurian Ore Shards)

blocks.heading: Guest Characters & Phantasmal Mirrors
blocks.content:
**Guest Characters:** Elise, Alfin, Towa, Angelica, Toval, Claire, and Sharon all join as regular party members with full customization. On 1st playthrough: Elise & Alfin start at **Lv 115**; Toval, Claire, Sharon at **Lv 130**; Towa & Angelica keep their level from the end of Act 2 Part 4.

**Phantasmal Mirrors** cost **200,000 Mira each** at the Orbment Station. When equipped as an accessory, they let a party member transform into a Special Character during battle.

**Available Mirrors:**
- *Male Only:* Azure Knight (Crow), Burning Bravery (Lloyd)
- *Female Only:* Witch of the Abyss (Vita), Black Rabbit (Altina), Silver Moon Princess (Rixia)

**Special Character Mechanics:**
- Cannot change equipment or quartz (no Status/Orbment/Equip screens)
- Only appear in battle, substituting the character wearing the mirror
- Level and stats depend entirely on the wearer (mirror replaces stats, palette, quartz set, and abilities)
- All EXP and Link EXP goes to the wearer; the Special Character doesn't level up independently
- Have no relevance outside the Old School House
- Each provides the effects of **Ice Crown** (10 CP Regen + Critical Up), a full set of **Lost Arts**, and a **Level 5 Master Quartz**

blocks.name: Loa Luciferia
blocks.heading: True Final Boss: Loa Luciferia (Floor 17)

stats.Loa Luciferia: HP 722,250 | Elements: Earth/Water/Fire/Wind 80%, Time/Space/Mirage 100% | Immune to AT Delay | Physical ★☆☆☆

blocks.strategy:
**Suggested Party:** Alisa, Fie, Alfin, Vita (Mirror), Laura, Millium/Altina (Mirror), Jusis, Lloyd (Mirror), Rixia (Mirror).

**Preparation:** Defense quartz (Adamantine Shield, Earth Bell, Aegis MQ, Aries MQ). Offense arts (Shadow Blade, Altair Cannon, Claiomh Solarion). Healers must have Seraphic Ring, Insight, and Impassion (unless using Alisa who provides these naturally). Millium uses Raven MQ + Quick Feet Set. Accessories cover Vanish, Death, and Stat Down protection. Swap links constantly to maintain Overdrive.

**Baiting Strategy (Safest):** Move Fie, Millium, Altina, or Lloyd to attack immediately after the boss's first turn. **Lloyd:** Use Burning Heart II before attacking, then Brave Smash II on boss and minions. Apply Insight to all party members immediately since the boss's craft hits the whole field and removes buffs. **Fie:** Cast Insight immediately and maintain SPD +50% buff constantly—this ensures the boss misses all attacks and cannot suck her in. **Millium:** Buff with SPD +50%, Impassion (or True Gladiator Belt), and Insight. Cast Ultimate Barrier every single turn. **Altina:** Similar to Millium but faster—attack physically when possible. Use a Mage (Vita, Emma, Elliot, Rixia) as main damage dealer.

**S-Craft Strategy:** Open with Alfin's Sacred Circle, Jusis' Platinum Shield, or Adamantine Shield (with Lv 5 Aegis/Earth Bell). Use Overdrive to buff everyone with Insight. Have a Mage target the whole battlefield with all-hitting arts or use Vita's crafts to clear summoned mobs. Build CP and blast the boss. On 2nd Playthrough, give Laura or Rean the Ice Crown for extra damage.

**Fight Analysis:**
- Boss is immune to **AT Delay** and is faster than all characters at all times
- Uses S-Craft as opening move and throughout fight—cannot be blocked by shields, hits for 1 HP on all characters, and removes status buffs
- **Insight** is essential for dodging the S-Craft; shields protect those who fail to dodge
- If a party member is absorbed, use S-Break immediately unless a Mage can attack on the next turn
- **Vita** is highly recommended: powerful arts, HP/EP regeneration, useful status effects (Summon Grianos), natural Vanish resistance
- **Crow Note:** Fast but deals less damage; Criminal Edge pushes mobs away from boss (bad for Shadow Blade mages). Can replace Laura for high damage with Deadly Cross
- With Domination Quartz and full buffs: **180,000 to 350,000 damage per hit**

> Sell all your Sepith and spend all Mira before finishing the game to avoid wasting points in NG+. In 2nd Playthrough, defeating the final boss with a Phantasmal Mirror character unlocks a bonus scene.

blocks.heading: Ending & New Game+
blocks.content:
Watch the ending and keep your save data for *Trails of Cold Steel III*. After completion, the **Memories** option appears in the system menu—use it to rewatch key scenes. On New Game+, watch the Final Bonding event on December 30 and save to unlock it in Memories.

Completing the game grants **5 NG+ Points** to spend on bonuses. You need **15 points total** (three playthroughs) to purchase everything. The 2nd playthrough enables **Black Records** collection (tied to a trophy) and access to the **Glacia Shrine** super boss.

> **2nd Playthrough:** Defeating the final boss with a Phantasmal Mirror character unlocks a bonus scene.

blocks.heading: New Game+ Carry Overs
rows: Carry over link levels. Unlock Rush and Burst from start.
Carry over equipment, MQ, quartz, consumables, books (some event items excluded).
Carry over battle, character, recipe, fishing, and book notebooks.
Start with stage outfits + misc outfits (e.g., Gaius' Nord clothes).
Start with 300k Mira and 3000 of each Sepith type.
Start with max bonding points for every Free Time event.
